            const loadingScreen = document.getElementById('loading-screen');
            const loadingBar = document.getElementById('loading-bar');
            const loadingText = document.getElementById('loading-text');
            const loadingLogo = document.getElementById('loading-logo');
            let loadProgress = 0;
            const totalAssets = 32; // 26 game assets + 1 logo + 5 headshot voices
            
            function updateLoadingProgress(assetName) {
                loadProgress++;
                const percent = Math.round((loadProgress / totalAssets) * 100);
                loadingBar.style.width = percent + '%';
                loadingText.textContent = `LOADING... ${percent}%`;
            }
            
            async function loadImage(id) {
                return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
                    const assetInfo = lib.getAsset(id);
                    if (!assetInfo) {
                        lib.log(`Asset not found: ${id}`);
                        updateLoadingProgress(id);
                        resolve(null);
                        return;
                    }
                    const img = new Image();
                    img.crossOrigin = 'anonymous';
                    img.onload = () => {
                        assetCache.images[id] = img;
                        updateLoadingProgress(id);
                        resolve(img);
                    };
                    img.onerror = () => {
                        lib.log(`Failed to load asset: ${id}`);
                        updateLoadingProgress(id);
                        resolve(null);
                    };
                    img.src = assetInfo.url;
                });
            }
            
            async function loadTexture(id) {
                const img = await loadImage(id);
                if (img) {
                    const texture = new THREE.Texture(img);
                    texture.needsUpdate = true;
                    assetCache.textures[id] = texture;
                    return texture;
                }
                return null;
            }
            
            // Initialize audio context
            initAudioContext();
            
            // FIRST: Load and display game logo immediately
            loadingText.textContent = 'LOADING LOGO...';
            const logoAssetInfo = lib.getAsset('game_logo');
            if (logoAssetInfo) {
                loadingLogo.src = logoAssetInfo.url;
                await new Promise(resolve => {
                    loadingLogo.onload = () => {
                        updateLoadingProgress('game_logo');
                        resolve();
                    };
                    loadingLogo.onerror = () => {
                        updateLoadingProgress('game_logo');
                        resolve();
                    };
                });
            } else {
                updateLoadingProgress('game_logo');
            }
            
            // THEN: Preload all other assets with progress tracking
            loadingText.textContent = 'LOADING ASSETS...';
            await Promise.all([
                loadTexture('zombie_texture'),
                loadTexture('hilltop_ground_texture'),
                loadTexture('ocean_water_texture'),
                loadImage('crosshair_icon'),
                loadImage('reload_icon'),
                loadImage('ammo_icon'),
                loadAudioBuffer('heavy_machinegun_fire').then(buffer => { heavyMachinegunBuffer = buffer; updateLoadingProgress('heavy_machinegun_fire'); }),
                loadAudioBuffer('background_music').then(buffer => { bgMusicBuffer = buffer; updateLoadingProgress('background_music'); }),
                loadAudioBuffer('zombie_attack_sound').then(buffer => { zombieAttackBuffer = buffer; updateLoadingProgress('zombie_attack_sound'); }),
                loadAudioBuffer('zombie_groan_sound').then(buffer => { zombieGroanBuffer = buffer; updateLoadingProgress('zombie_groan_sound'); }),
                loadAudioBuffer('wave_victory_sound').then(buffer => { waveVictoryBuffer = buffer; updateLoadingProgress('wave_victory_sound'); }),
                loadAudioBuffer('radio_supplies_deployed').then(buffer => { radioSuppliesBuffer = buffer; updateLoadingProgress('radio_supplies_deployed'); }),
                loadAudioBuffer('item_use_sound').then(buffer => { itemUseBuffer = buffer; updateLoadingProgress('item_use_sound'); }),

                loadAudioBuffer('footstep_sound').then(buffer => { footstepBuffer = buffer; updateLoadingProgress('footstep_sound'); }),
                loadAudioBuffer('supply_collect_sound').then(buffer => { supplyCollectBuffer = buffer; updateLoadingProgress('supply_collect_sound'); }),
                loadAudioBuffer('countdown_beep_sound').then(buffer => { countdownBeepBuffer = buffer; updateLoadingProgress('countdown_beep_sound'); }),
                loadAudioBuffer('base_intrusion_alarm').then(buffer => { waveStartBuffer = buffer; updateLoadingProgress('base_intrusion_alarm'); }),
                loadAudioBuffer('heavy_breathing_sound').then(buffer => { heavyBreathingBuffer = buffer; updateLoadingProgress('heavy_breathing_sound'); }),
                loadAudioBuffer('heartbeat_sound').then(buffer => { heartbeatBuffer = buffer; updateLoadingProgress('heartbeat_sound'); }),
                loadAudioBuffer('headshot_sound').then(buffer => { headshotBuffer = buffer; updateLoadingProgress('headshot_sound'); }),
                loadAudioBuffer('airstrike_explosion_sound').then(buffer => { airstrikeExplosionBuffer = buffer; updateLoadingProgress('airstrike_explosion_sound'); }),
                loadAudioBuffer('rummage_sound').then(buffer => { rummageBuffer = buffer; updateLoadingProgress('rummage_sound'); }),
                loadAudioBuffer('bat_wing_flap_sound').then(buffer => { batWingFlapBuffer = buffer; updateLoadingProgress('bat_wing_flap_sound'); }),
                loadAudioBuffer('bat_screech_sound').then(buffer => { batScreechBuffer = buffer; updateLoadingProgress('bat_screech_sound'); }),
                loadAudioBuffer('helmet_hit_sound').then(buffer => { helmetHitBuffer = buffer; updateLoadingProgress('helmet_hit_sound'); }),
                // Load headshot voice lines
                loadAudioBuffer('headshot_voice_1').then(buffer => { if(buffer) headshotVoiceBuffers.push(buffer); updateLoadingProgress('headshot_voice_1'); }),
                loadAudioBuffer('headshot_voice_2').then(buffer => { if(buffer) headshotVoiceBuffers.push(buffer); updateLoadingProgress('headshot_voice_2'); }),
                loadAudioBuffer('headshot_voice_3').then(buffer => { if(buffer) headshotVoiceBuffers.push(buffer); updateLoadingProgress('headshot_voice_3'); }),
                loadAudioBuffer('headshot_voice_4').then(buffer => { if(buffer) headshotVoiceBuffers.push(buffer); updateLoadingProgress('headshot_voice_4'); }),
                loadAudioBuffer('headshot_voice_5').then(buffer => { if(buffer) headshotVoiceBuffers.push(buffer); updateLoadingProgress('headshot_voice_5'); }),
                // Load ranged zombie sounds
                loadAudioBuffer('bone_throw_sound').then(buffer => { boneThrowBuffer = buffer; }),
                loadAudioBuffer('screamer_attack_sound').then(buffer => { screamerAttackBuffer = buffer; }),
                // Load plane flyover sound
                loadAudioBuffer('plane_flyover_sound').then(buffer => { planeFlyoverBuffer = buffer; updateLoadingProgress('plane_flyover_sound'); })
            ]);
            
            // Short delay to ensure everything is ready
            loadingText.textContent = 'READY!';
            loadingBar.style.width = '100%';
            await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 500));
            
            // Hide loading screen
            loadingScreen.classList.add('hidden');

            // ==================== THREE.JS SETUP ====================
            const scene = new THREE.Scene();
            const camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(75, canvas.clientWidth / canvas.clientHeight, 0.1, 1000);
            const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ canvas: canvas, antialias: true });
            
            function resizeRenderer() {
                const width = gameWorld.clientWidth;
                const height = gameWorld.clientHeight;
                renderer.setSize(width, height);
                camera.aspect = width / height;
                camera.updateProjectionMatrix();
            }
            resizeRenderer();
            window.addEventListener('resize', resizeRenderer);
            
            // Camera setup - player position on hilltop (elevated)
            camera.position.set(0, 15, 0);
            let cameraYaw = 0;
            let cameraPitch = -0.4; // Looking down at the slope
            const maxPitch = Math.PI / 4;
            const minPitch = -Math.PI / 2.2; // Can look further down to see zombies
            
            // Calculate max camera yaw based on current wave spawn angle + 2x increment
            function getMaxCameraYaw() {
                const initialAngle = config.gameplay.spawnAngleInitial || 30;
                const angleIncrement = config.gameplay.spawnAngleIncrement || 30;
                const maxAngle = config.gameplay.spawnAngleMax || 360;
                
                // Current wave's spawn angle range
                const waveAngleRange = Math.min(
                    initialAngle + (currentWave - 1) * angleIncrement,
                    maxAngle
                );
                
                // Camera limit = spawn angle + 2x increment
                const cameraAngleLimit = Math.min(waveAngleRange + angleIncrement * 2, 360);
                
                // Convert to radians (half for each side from center)
                return (cameraAngleLimit / 2) * (Math.PI / 180);
            }
            
            // Clamp camera yaw within allowed range
            function clampCameraYaw() {
                const maxYaw = getMaxCameraYaw();
                cameraYaw = Math.max(-maxYaw, Math.min(maxYaw, cameraYaw));
            }

            // ==================== LIGHTING ====================
            // Sky colors for different waves
            const waveSkyThemes = [
                { sky: 0x706860, fog: 0x908878, ambient: 0xe8e8d0, directional: 0xffffcc, name: 'overcast' },      // Wave 1
                { sky: 0x8b3030, fog: 0x6b4040, ambient: 0xffb090, directional: 0xff8866, name: 'blood_dawn' },   // Wave 2
                { sky: 0x994422, fog: 0x886655, ambient: 0xffc090, directional: 0xffaa66, name: 'fiery_dusk' },   // Wave 3
                { sky: 0x553322, fog: 0x443322, ambient: 0xcc9070, directional: 0xcc7744, name: 'dark_dusk' },    // Wave 4
                { sky: 0x1a2a3a, fog: 0x2a3a4a, ambient: 0x8899aa, directional: 0xaabbcc, name: 'night' },        // Wave 5+
            ];
            
            let currentSkyTheme = 0;
            
            function setupLighting(waveNumber = 1) {
                // Remove existing lights
                scene.children.filter(c => c.isLight).forEach(l => scene.remove(l));
                
                // Select theme based on wave (cycles through themes)
                const themeIndex = Math.min(waveNumber - 1, waveSkyThemes.length - 1);
                const theme = waveSkyThemes[themeIndex];
                currentSkyTheme = themeIndex;
                
                const ambient = new THREE.AmbientLight(theme.ambient, 1.0);
                scene.add(ambient);
                
                const directional = new THREE.DirectionalLight(theme.directional, 1.1);
                directional.position.set(5, 10, -5);
                scene.add(directional);
                
                scene.background = new THREE.Color(theme.sky);
                scene.fog = new THREE.FogExp2(theme.fog, 0.003);
            }
            
            setupLighting(1);
            
            // ==================== 3D MACHINE GUN TURRET ====================
            const turretGroup = new THREE.Group();
            
            function createMetalTexture(baseColor, hasRivets = false) {
                const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
                canvas.width = 64;
                canvas.height = 64;
                const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
                ctx.fillStyle = baseColor;
                ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 64, 64);
                // Add metal scratches and wear
                for (let i = 0; i < 40; i++) {
                    const x = Math.random() * 64;
                    const y = Math.random() * 64;
                    const len = 3 + Math.random() * 12;
                    const brightness = Math.random() > 0.5 ? 255 : 0;
                    ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${brightness},${brightness},${brightness},0.08)`;
                    ctx.lineWidth = 1;
                    ctx.beginPath();
                    ctx.moveTo(x, y);
                    ctx.lineTo(x + len, y + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 3);
                    ctx.stroke();
                }
                // Add rivets if requested
                if (hasRivets) {
                    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(60,60,60,0.5)';
                    for (let rx = 8; rx < 64; rx += 16) {
                        for (let ry = 8; ry < 64; ry += 16) {
                            ctx.beginPath();
                            ctx.arc(rx, ry, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                            ctx.fill();
                        }
                    }
                }
                const texture = new THREE.CanvasTexture(canvas);
                texture.magFilter = THREE.NearestFilter;
                return texture;
            }
            
            // Gun body materials - enhanced
            const gunMetalMat = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ map: createMetalTexture('#4a4a4a', true) });
            const gunDarkMat = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ map: createMetalTexture('#1a1a1a') });
            const gunBrassMat = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ map: createMetalTexture('#8b7355') });
            const gunSteelMat = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ map: createMetalTexture('#5a5a5a') });
            const gunAccentMat = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ color: 0x2a2a2a });
            
            // === MAIN HOUSING / RECEIVER ===
            // Back housing - larger receiver block
            const housingGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.4, 0.32, 0.5);
            const housing = new THREE.Mesh(housingGeo, gunMetalMat);
            housing.position.set(0, -0.48, -0.35);
            turretGroup.add(housing);
            
            // Motor housing (cylindrical, where barrels attach)
            const motorHousingGeo = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.18, 0.16, 0.35, 12);
            const motorHousing = new THREE.Mesh(motorHousingGeo, gunSteelMat);
            motorHousing.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
            motorHousing.position.set(0, -0.48, -0.75);
            turretGroup.add(motorHousing);
            
            // Front barrel mount ring
            const mountRingGeo = new THREE.TorusGeometry(0.14, 0.025, 8, 16);
            const mountRing = new THREE.Mesh(mountRingGeo, gunDarkMat);
            mountRing.position.set(0, -0.48, -0.95);
            turretGroup.add(mountRing);
            
            // === GATLING BARREL GROUP ===
            const barrelGroup = new THREE.Group();
            barrelGroup.position.set(0, -0.48, -1.5);
            const barrelLength = 1.4;
            const numBarrels = 6;
            const barrelRadius = 0.09; // Spread of barrels from center
            
            // Create 6 rotating barrels (Gatling style)
            for (let i = 0; i < numBarrels; i++) {
                const angle = (i / numBarrels) * Math.PI * 2;
                
                // Individual barrel tube
                const barrelGeo = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.022, 0.025, barrelLength, 8);
                const barrel = new THREE.Mesh(barrelGeo, gunDarkMat);
                barrel.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
                barrel.position.set(
                    Math.cos(angle) * barrelRadius,
                    Math.sin(angle) * barrelRadius,
                    -barrelLength / 2 + 0.5
                );
                barrelGroup.add(barrel);
                
                // Barrel tip (muzzle for each barrel)
                const tipGeo = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.018, 0.022, 0.08, 8);
                const tip = new THREE.Mesh(tipGeo, gunSteelMat);
                tip.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
                tip.position.set(
                    Math.cos(angle) * barrelRadius,
                    Math.sin(angle) * barrelRadius,
                    -barrelLength + 0.1
                );
                barrelGroup.add(tip);
            }
            
            // Central core barrel (larger, center)
            const coreBarrelGeo = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.035, 0.04, barrelLength + 0.1, 10);
            const coreBarrel = new THREE.Mesh(coreBarrelGeo, gunMetalMat);
            coreBarrel.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
            coreBarrel.position.set(0, 0, -barrelLength / 2 + 0.45);
            barrelGroup.add(coreBarrel);
            
            // Front barrel clamp ring
            const frontClampGeo = new THREE.TorusGeometry(0.1, 0.018, 6, 16);
            const frontClamp = new THREE.Mesh(frontClampGeo, gunSteelMat);
            frontClamp.position.set(0, 0, -0.3);
            barrelGroup.add(frontClamp);
            
            // Mid barrel clamp ring  
            const midClampGeo = new THREE.TorusGeometry(0.1, 0.015, 6, 16);
            const midClamp = new THREE.Mesh(midClampGeo, gunSteelMat);
            midClamp.position.set(0, 0, 0.15);
            barrelGroup.add(midClamp);
            
            // Rear barrel shroud with cooling vents
            const shroudGeo = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.14, 0.12, 0.4, 12);
            const shroud = new THREE.Mesh(shroudGeo, gunMetalMat);
            shroud.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
            shroud.position.set(0, 0, 0.55);
            barrelGroup.add(shroud);
            
            // Cooling vent slots on shroud
            for (let v = 0; v < 6; v++) {
                const ventAngle = (v / 6) * Math.PI * 2;
                const ventGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.01, 0.04, 0.25);
                const vent = new THREE.Mesh(ventGeo, gunDarkMat);
                vent.position.set(
                    Math.cos(ventAngle) * 0.13,
                    Math.sin(ventAngle) * 0.13,
                    0.55
                );
                vent.rotation.z = ventAngle;
                barrelGroup.add(vent);
            }
            
            turretGroup.add(barrelGroup);
            
            // === FLASH HIDER / MUZZLE ===
            const muzzleGeo = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.1, 0.14, 0.12, 8);
            const muzzle = new THREE.Mesh(muzzleGeo, gunDarkMat);
            muzzle.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
            muzzle.position.set(0, -0.48, -2.05);
            turretGroup.add(muzzle);
            
            // Muzzle ring detail
            const muzzleRingGeo = new THREE.TorusGeometry(0.11, 0.012, 6, 12);
            const muzzleRing = new THREE.Mesh(muzzleRingGeo, gunSteelMat);
            muzzleRing.position.set(0, -0.48, -2.1);
            turretGroup.add(muzzleRing);
            
            // === AMMO FEED SYSTEM ===
            // Ammo box (larger, more detailed)
            const ammoBoxGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.28, 0.22, 0.18);
            const ammoBox = new THREE.Mesh(ammoBoxGeo, gunBrassMat);
            ammoBox.position.set(0.28, -0.58, -0.35);
            turretGroup.add(ammoBox);
            
            // Ammo box lid
            const lidGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.26, 0.03, 0.16);
            const lid = new THREE.Mesh(lidGeo, gunMetalMat);
            lid.position.set(0.28, -0.45, -0.35);
            turretGroup.add(lid);
            
            // Ammo feed chute
            const chuteGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.08, 0.06, 0.25);
            const chute = new THREE.Mesh(chuteGeo, gunBrassMat);
            chute.position.set(0.16, -0.52, -0.5);
            chute.rotation.y = -0.3;
            turretGroup.add(chute);
            
            // Belt feed cover
            const feedCoverGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.12, 0.08, 0.15);
            const feedCover = new THREE.Mesh(feedCoverGeo, gunMetalMat);
            feedCover.position.set(0.08, -0.44, -0.55);
            turretGroup.add(feedCover);
            
            // === HANDLES / GRIPS ===
            const gripMat = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ color: 0x1a1a1a });
            
            // Spade grips (butterfly trigger style)
            const spadeGripGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.04, 0.18, 0.08);
            
            const leftSpade = new THREE.Mesh(spadeGripGeo, gripMat);
            leftSpade.position.set(-0.18, -0.62, -0.15);
            leftSpade.rotation.x = 0.4;
            turretGroup.add(leftSpade);
            
            const rightSpade = new THREE.Mesh(spadeGripGeo, gripMat);
            rightSpade.position.set(0.18, -0.62, -0.15);
            rightSpade.rotation.x = 0.4;
            turretGroup.add(rightSpade);
            
            // Grip end caps
            const capGeo = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.025, 8, 6);
            const leftCap = new THREE.Mesh(capGeo, gripMat);
            leftCap.position.set(-0.18, -0.72, -0.08);
            turretGroup.add(leftCap);
            
            const rightCap = new THREE.Mesh(capGeo, gripMat);
            rightCap.position.set(0.18, -0.72, -0.08);
            turretGroup.add(rightCap);
            
            // Trigger bar (between grips)
            const triggerBarGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.28, 0.025, 0.03);
            const triggerBar = new THREE.Mesh(triggerBarGeo, gunDarkMat);
            triggerBar.position.set(0, -0.58, -0.18);
            turretGroup.add(triggerBar);
            
            // === TOP RAIL / SIGHT MOUNT ===
            const railGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.06, 0.03, 0.35);
            const rail = new THREE.Mesh(railGeo, gunDarkMat);
            rail.position.set(0, -0.3, -0.5);
            turretGroup.add(rail);
            
            // Rail grooves
            for (let g = 0; g < 6; g++) {
                const grooveGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.07, 0.015, 0.015);
                const groove = new THREE.Mesh(grooveGeo, gunAccentMat);
                groove.position.set(0, -0.285, -0.65 + g * 0.055);
                turretGroup.add(groove);
            }
            
            // Front sight post
            const frontSightGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.025, 0.06, 0.025);
            const frontSight = new THREE.Mesh(frontSightGeo, gunDarkMat);
            frontSight.position.set(0, -0.26, -0.85);
            turretGroup.add(frontSight);
            
            // Rear sight aperture
            const rearSightGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.05, 0.05, 0.025);
            const rearSight = new THREE.Mesh(rearSightGeo, gunDarkMat);
            rearSight.position.set(0, -0.27, -0.25);
            turretGroup.add(rearSight);
            
            // === SIDE DETAILS ===
            // Cocking handle
            const cockingGeo = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.015, 0.015, 0.12, 6);
            const cocking = new THREE.Mesh(cockingGeo, gunSteelMat);
            cocking.rotation.z = Math.PI / 2;
            cocking.position.set(-0.25, -0.45, -0.5);
            turretGroup.add(cocking);
            
            // Cocking handle knob
            const knobGeo = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.025, 6, 6);
            const knob = new THREE.Mesh(knobGeo, gunAccentMat);
            knob.position.set(-0.32, -0.45, -0.5);
            turretGroup.add(knob);
            
            // Add turret as child of camera so it follows view
            camera.add(turretGroup);
            scene.add(camera);
            
            // Gun animation state
            let gunRecoil = 0;
            let barrelRotation = 0;
            
            // Idle sway animation for realistic gun holding feel
            let idleSwayTime = 0;
            const IDLE_SWAY_SPEED = 1.2; // Speed of breathing/sway
            const IDLE_SWAY_X = 0.003; // Horizontal sway amount
            const IDLE_SWAY_Y = 0.005; // Vertical sway amount (breathing)
            const IDLE_SWAY_ROTATION = 0.002; // Slight rotation sway
            
            // 3D Muzzle flash system
            const muzzleFlashGroup = new THREE.Group();
            muzzleFlashGroup.visible = false;
            
            // Create multiple flash layers for realistic effect
            const flashMaterials = [];
            
            // Core flash - bright white/yellow
            const coreGeo = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.15, 8, 8);
            const coreMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ 
                color: 0xffffee, 
                transparent: true, 
                opacity: 1,
                blending: THREE.AdditiveBlending
            });
            const coreFlash = new THREE.Mesh(coreGeo, coreMat);
            muzzleFlashGroup.add(coreFlash);
            flashMaterials.push(coreMat);
            
            // Outer glow - orange
            const glowGeo = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.25, 8, 8);
            const glowMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ 
                color: 0xff8800, 
                transparent: true, 
                opacity: 0.8,
                blending: THREE.AdditiveBlending
            });
            const outerGlow = new THREE.Mesh(glowGeo, glowMat);
            muzzleFlashGroup.add(outerGlow);
            flashMaterials.push(glowMat);
            
            // Flash spikes - directional light streaks
            for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
                const spikeGeo = new THREE.ConeGeometry(0.04, 0.4, 4);
                const spikeMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ 
                    color: 0xffaa33, 
                    transparent: true, 
                    opacity: 0.9,
                    blending: THREE.AdditiveBlending
                });
                const spike = new THREE.Mesh(spikeGeo, spikeMat);
                const angle = (i / 6) * Math.PI * 2;
                spike.rotation.z = angle;
                spike.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
                spike.position.z = -0.15;
                muzzleFlashGroup.add(spike);
                flashMaterials.push(spikeMat);
            }
            
            // Position at muzzle end
            muzzleFlashGroup.position.set(0, -0.5, -1.95);
            turretGroup.add(muzzleFlashGroup);
            
            let muzzleFlashTimer = 0;
            const MUZZLE_FLASH_DURATION = 0.08;
            
            // ==================== APOCALYPTIC SKY ====================
            // Create a detailed sky dome with clouds and apocalyptic elements
            function createApocalypticSky(waveNum = 1) {
                const skyGroup = new THREE.Group();
                
                // Sky dome with gradient based on wave
                const skyDomeGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(400, 32, 16, 0, Math.PI * 2, 0, Math.PI / 2);
                const skyCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
                skyCanvas.width = 512;
                skyCanvas.height = 256;
                const skyCtx = skyCanvas.getContext('2d');
                
                const themeIndex = Math.min(waveNum - 1, waveSkyThemes.length - 1);
                let gradient;
                let isNight = themeIndex >= 4;
                let isDuskDawn = themeIndex >= 1 && themeIndex <= 3;
                
                // Create gradient based on wave theme
                gradient = skyCtx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 256);
                if (themeIndex === 0) {
                    // Wave 1 - overcast
                    gradient.addColorStop(0, '#4a4a40');
                    gradient.addColorStop(0.3, '#6a6a58');
                    gradient.addColorStop(0.5, '#888878');
                    gradient.addColorStop(0.7, '#a0a090');
                    gradient.addColorStop(1, '#807868');
                } else if (themeIndex === 1) {
                    // Wave 2 - blood dawn
                    gradient.addColorStop(0, '#2a1515');
                    gradient.addColorStop(0.3, '#6b2020');
                    gradient.addColorStop(0.5, '#aa4030');
                    gradient.addColorStop(0.7, '#cc6040');
                    gradient.addColorStop(1, '#8b5050');
                } else if (themeIndex === 2) {
                    // Wave 3 - fiery dusk
                    gradient.addColorStop(0, '#1a1020');
                    gradient.addColorStop(0.2, '#4a2030');
                    gradient.addColorStop(0.4, '#883322');
                    gradient.addColorStop(0.6, '#cc5522');
                    gradient.addColorStop(0.8, '#ff7733');
                    gradient.addColorStop(1, '#994422');
                } else if (themeIndex === 3) {
                    // Wave 4 - dark dusk
                    gradient.addColorStop(0, '#151015');
                    gradient.addColorStop(0.3, '#352020');
                    gradient.addColorStop(0.5, '#553322');
                    gradient.addColorStop(0.7, '#664433');
                    gradient.addColorStop(1, '#443322');
                } else {
                    // Wave 5+ - night
                    gradient.addColorStop(0, '#0a0a15');
                    gradient.addColorStop(0.3, '#151525');
                    gradient.addColorStop(0.5, '#1a2a3a');
                    gradient.addColorStop(0.7, '#253545');
                    gradient.addColorStop(1, '#2a3a4a');
                }
                
                skyCtx.fillStyle = gradient;
                skyCtx.fillRect(0, 0, 512, 256);
                
                // Add stars for night
                if (isNight) {
                    skyCtx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
                    for (let i = 0; i < 100; i++) {
                        const x = Math.random() * 512;
                        const y = Math.random() * 150;
                        const size = Math.random() * 2 + 0.5;
                        skyCtx.globalAlpha = Math.random() * 0.5 + 0.3;
                        skyCtx.beginPath();
                        skyCtx.arc(x, y, size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                        skyCtx.fill();
                    }
                    skyCtx.globalAlpha = 1;
                }
                
                // Add clouds/smoke streaks
                skyCtx.globalAlpha = 0.3;
                for (let i = 0; i < 15; i++) {
                    const y = 50 + Math.random() * 150;
                    const width = 100 + Math.random() * 200;
                    const height = 10 + Math.random() * 30;
                    const x = Math.random() * 512;
                    
                    const cloudGradient = skyCtx.createRadialGradient(x, y, 0, x, y, width / 2);
                    if (isDuskDawn) {
                        cloudGradient.addColorStop(0, '#555');
                        cloudGradient.addColorStop(1, 'transparent');
                    } else {
                        cloudGradient.addColorStop(0, '#333');
                        cloudGradient.addColorStop(1, 'transparent');
                    }
                    skyCtx.fillStyle = cloudGradient;
                    skyCtx.fillRect(x - width/2, y - height/2, width, height);
                }
                skyCtx.globalAlpha = 1;
                
                const skyTexture = new THREE.CanvasTexture(skyCanvas);
                const skyMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ 
                    map: skyTexture, 
                    side: THREE.BackSide,
                    fog: false
                });
                const skyDome = new THREE.Mesh(skyDomeGeometry, skyMaterial);
                skyDome.rotation.x = Math.PI;
                skyDome.position.y = -10;
                skyGroup.add(skyDome);
                
                // Add distant smoke columns (burning buildings)
                const smokeMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ 
                    color: isNight ? 0x333344 : 0x444444,
                    transparent: true,
                    opacity: 0.4,
                    fog: true
                });
                
                for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
                    const angle = (i / 6) * Math.PI * 2 + Math.random() * 0.5;
                    const dist = 150 + Math.random() * 100;
                    
                    // Smoke column
                    const smokeGeo = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(3, 8, 80 + Math.random() * 40, 8);
                    const smoke = new THREE.Mesh(smokeGeo, smokeMaterial);
                    smoke.position.set(
                        Math.cos(angle) * dist,
                        30 + Math.random() * 20,
                        Math.sin(angle) * dist
                    );
                    smoke.rotation.z = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.2;
                    skyGroup.add(smoke);
                }
                
                // Add moon or sun
                if (isNight) {
                    // Eerie moon
                    const moonGeo = new THREE.CircleGeometry(15, 32);
                    const moonMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ 
                        color: 0xccddee,
                        fog: false
                    });
                    const moon = new THREE.Mesh(moonGeo, moonMat);
                    moon.position.set(100, 120, -200);
                    moon.lookAt(0, 0, 0);
                    skyGroup.add(moon);
                    
                    // Moon glow
                    const glowGeo = new THREE.CircleGeometry(25, 32);
                    const glowMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ 
                        color: 0x6688aa,
                        transparent: true,
                        opacity: 0.3,
                        fog: false
                    });
                    const glow = new THREE.Mesh(glowGeo, glowMat);
                    glow.position.set(100, 120, -201);
                    glow.lookAt(0, 0, 0);
                    skyGroup.add(glow);
                } else if (isDuskDawn) {
                    // Dim sun through haze
                    const sunGeo = new THREE.CircleGeometry(20, 32);
                    const sunMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ 
                        color: themeIndex === 1 ? 0xff6644 : 0xff8844,
                        fog: false
                    });
                    const sun = new THREE.Mesh(sunGeo, sunMat);
                    const sunAngle = themeIndex === 1 ? Math.PI * 0.7 : Math.PI * 0.3;
                    sun.position.set(Math.cos(sunAngle) * 200, 40, Math.sin(sunAngle) * 200);
                    sun.lookAt(0, 0, 0);
                    skyGroup.add(sun);
                    
                    // Sun glow
                    const glowGeo = new THREE.CircleGeometry(40, 32);
                    const glowMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ 
                        color: themeIndex === 1 ? 0xff4422 : 0xff6633,
                        transparent: true,
                        opacity: 0.3,
                        fog: false
                    });
                    const glow = new THREE.Mesh(glowGeo, glowMat);
                    glow.position.set(Math.cos(sunAngle) * 199, 40, Math.sin(sunAngle) * 199);
                    glow.lookAt(0, 0, 0);
                    skyGroup.add(glow);
                }
                
                // Add flying debris/birds in distance
                const debrisMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ color: 0x222222, fog: false });
                for (let i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
                    const debrisGeo = new THREE.PlaneGeometry(2, 1);
                    const debris = new THREE.Mesh(debrisGeo, debrisMat);
                    const angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
                    const dist = 100 + Math.random() * 100;
                    debris.position.set(
                        Math.cos(angle) * dist,
                        50 + Math.random() * 50,
                        Math.sin(angle) * dist
                    );
                    debris.rotation.set(Math.random() * Math.PI, Math.random() * Math.PI, Math.random() * Math.PI);
                    debris.userData.angle = angle;
                    debris.userData.dist = dist;
                    debris.userData.speed = 0.1 + Math.random() * 0.2;
                    debris.userData.baseY = debris.position.y;
                    skyGroup.add(debris);
                }
                
                return skyGroup;
            }
            
            let apocalypticSky = createApocalypticSky(1);
            scene.add(apocalypticSky);
            
            // Function to update sky when wave changes
            function updateSky(waveNum) {
                scene.remove(apocalypticSky);
                apocalypticSky = createApocalypticSky(waveNum);
                scene.add(apocalypticSky);
            }

            // ==================== ENVIRONMENT ====================
            // Create natural-looking ground texture with organic noise
            function createNaturalGroundTexture() {
                const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
                canvas.width = 256;
                canvas.height = 256;
                const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
                
                // Simple noise function for texture
                function noise2D(x, y, seed) {
                    const n = Math.sin(x * 12.9898 + y * 78.233 + seed) * 43758.5453;
                    return n - Math.floor(n);
                }
                
                // Multi-octave noise for more natural look
                function fbmNoise(x, y, octaves) {
                    let value = 0;
                    let amplitude = 1;
                    let frequency = 1;
                    let maxValue = 0;
                    for (let i = 0; i < octaves; i++) {
                        value += noise2D(x * frequency, y * frequency, i * 100) * amplitude;
                        maxValue += amplitude;
                        amplitude *= 0.5;
                        frequency *= 2;
                    }
                    return value / maxValue;
                }
                
                // Base colors for earth tones
                const baseColors = [
                    [74, 61, 48],   // #4a3d30
                    [61, 50, 40],   // #3d3228
                    [82, 68, 58],   // #52443a
                    [58, 48, 37],   // #3a3025
                    [70, 58, 45],   // #463a2d
                    [65, 53, 42]    // #41352a
                ];
                
                // Fill with noise-based coloring
                const imageData = ctx.createImageData(256, 256);
                for (let y = 0; y < 256; y++) {
                    for (let x = 0; x < 256; x++) {
                        // Use multiple noise layers with different scales
                        const n1 = fbmNoise(x * 0.02, y * 0.02, 4);
                        const n2 = fbmNoise(x * 0.05 + 50, y * 0.05 + 50, 3);
                        const n3 = fbmNoise(x * 0.1 + 100, y * 0.1 + 100, 2);
                        
                        // Blend noise values
                        const blend = n1 * 0.5 + n2 * 0.3 + n3 * 0.2;
                        
                        // Select base color based on noise
                        const colorIdx = Math.floor(blend * baseColors.length) % baseColors.length;
                        const baseColor = baseColors[colorIdx];
                        
                        // Add variation to the color
                        const variation = (n3 - 0.5) * 30;
                        const r = Math.max(0, Math.min(255, baseColor[0] + variation));
                        const g = Math.max(0, Math.min(255, baseColor[1] + variation * 0.8));
                        const b = Math.max(0, Math.min(255, baseColor[2] + variation * 0.6));
                        
                        const idx = (y * 256 + x) * 4;
                        imageData.data[idx] = r;
                        imageData.data[idx + 1] = g;
                        imageData.data[idx + 2] = b;
                        imageData.data[idx + 3] = 255;
                    }
                }
                ctx.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0);
                
                // Add scattered pebbles and dirt patches
                for (let i = 0; i < 200; i++) {
                    const x = Math.random() * 256;
                    const y = Math.random() * 256;
                    const size = 1 + Math.random() * 4;
                    const brightness = 40 + Math.random() * 40;
                    ctx.fillStyle = `rgb(${brightness + 20}, ${brightness + 10}, ${brightness})`;
                    ctx.globalAlpha = 0.3 + Math.random() * 0.4;
                    ctx.beginPath();
                    ctx.ellipse(x, y, size, size * (0.5 + Math.random() * 0.5), Math.random() * Math.PI, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                    ctx.fill();
                }
                
                ctx.globalAlpha = 1;
                
                const texture = new THREE.CanvasTexture(canvas);
                texture.wrapS = THREE.RepeatWrapping;
                texture.wrapT = THREE.RepeatWrapping;
                texture.magFilter = THREE.LinearFilter;
                texture.minFilter = THREE.LinearMipmapLinearFilter;
                return texture;
            }
            
            const naturalGroundTexture = createNaturalGroundTexture();
            
            // Create a visible slope from hilltop to the wasteland
            // The slope is a large disc that tilts gradually from center (high) to edge (low)
            
            // Hilltop platform - small flat area where player stands
            const hilltopGeometry = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(6, 6, 1, 16);
            const hilltopTex = naturalGroundTexture.clone();
            hilltopTex.repeat.set(2, 2);
            const hilltopMaterial = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ map: hilltopTex });
            const hilltop = new THREE.Mesh(hilltopGeometry, hilltopMaterial);
            hilltop.position.set(0, 10, 0);
            scene.add(hilltop);
            
            // Create slope using a custom geometry - with natural height variation
            const slopeSegments = 64;
            const slopeRings = 32;
            const slopeGeometry = new THREE.BufferGeometry();
            const slopeVertices = [];
            const slopeUvs = [];
            const slopeIndices = [];
            
            const HILLTOP_RADIUS = 6;
            const SLOPE_OUTER_RADIUS = 120;
            const HILLTOP_Y = 9.5;
            const SLOPE_BOTTOM_Y = -15;
            
            // Simple noise function for terrain variation
            function terrainNoise(x, z, scale, amplitude) {
                const nx = x * scale;
                const nz = z * scale;
                return (Math.sin(nx * 1.5 + nz * 0.8) * 0.5 + 
                        Math.sin(nx * 0.7 - nz * 1.3) * 0.3 +
                        Math.sin(nx * 2.1 + nz * 1.9) * 0.2) * amplitude;
            }
            
            // Create vertices for the slope with height variation
            for (let ring = 0; ring <= slopeRings; ring++) {
                const t = ring / slopeRings;
                const radius = HILLTOP_RADIUS + t * (SLOPE_OUTER_RADIUS - HILLTOP_RADIUS);
                // Base curve from top to bottom
                const baseY = HILLTOP_Y - Math.pow(t, 0.7) * (HILLTOP_Y - SLOPE_BOTTOM_Y);
                
                for (let seg = 0; seg <= slopeSegments; seg++) {
                    const angle = (seg / slopeSegments) * Math.PI * 2;
                    const x = Math.cos(angle) * radius;
                    const z = Math.sin(angle) * radius;
                    
                    // Add terrain noise - more variation in the middle of the slope
                    const noiseStrength = Math.sin(t * Math.PI) * 2.5; // Max noise in middle
                    const noise1 = terrainNoise(x, z, 0.08, noiseStrength);
                    const noise2 = terrainNoise(x + 100, z + 100, 0.15, noiseStrength * 0.5);
                    const y = baseY + noise1 + noise2;
                    
                    slopeVertices.push(x, y, z);
                    slopeUvs.push(seg / slopeSegments * 6, ring / slopeRings * 6);
                }
            }
            
            // Create faces
            for (let ring = 0; ring < slopeRings; ring++) {
                for (let seg = 0; seg < slopeSegments; seg++) {
                    const current = ring * (slopeSegments + 1) + seg;
                    const next = current + slopeSegments + 1;
                    
                    slopeIndices.push(current, next, current + 1);
                    slopeIndices.push(current + 1, next, next + 1);
                }
            }
            
            slopeGeometry.setAttribute('position', new THREE.Float32BufferAttribute(slopeVertices, 3));
            slopeGeometry.setAttribute('uv', new THREE.Float32BufferAttribute(slopeUvs, 2));
            slopeGeometry.setIndex(slopeIndices);
            slopeGeometry.computeVertexNormals();
            
            const slopeTex = naturalGroundTexture.clone();
            slopeTex.repeat.set(6, 6);
            const slopeMaterial = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ map: slopeTex, side: THREE.DoubleSide });
            const slope = new THREE.Mesh(slopeGeometry, slopeMaterial);
            scene.add(slope);
            
            // Create rocks that blend naturally with terrain - store positions for zombie avoidance
            const rockObstacles = []; // Store rock positions for pathfinding
            
            function createNaturalRock(baseScale) {
                // Use IcosahedronGeometry for smoother base shape
                const detail = Math.random() < 0.5 ? 1 : 0;
                const geo = new THREE.IcosahedronGeometry(1, detail);
                
                // Deform vertices for natural weathered rock shape
                const positions = geo.attributes.position;
                const seed = Math.random() * 1000;
                for (let i = 0; i < positions.count; i++) {
                    const x = positions.getX(i);
                    const y = positions.getY(i);
                    const z = positions.getZ(i);
                    
                    // Multi-frequency noise deformation
                    const n1 = Math.sin(x * 3 + seed) * Math.cos(z * 3 + seed) * 0.15;
                    const n2 = Math.sin(x * 7 + y * 5 + seed) * 0.08;
                    const n3 = Math.cos(y * 4 + z * 6 + seed) * 0.1;
                    
                    // Flatten bottom for ground contact
                    const flattenFactor = y < -0.3 ? 0.6 : 1;
                    const noise = 0.85 + n1 + n2 + n3;
                    
                    positions.setXYZ(i, 
                        x * noise, 
                        y * noise * flattenFactor, 
                        z * noise
                    );
                }
                geo.computeVertexNormals();
                return geo;
            }
            
            function createRockMaterial(embedInGround) {
                // Create rock texture that matches ground colors
                const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
                canvas.width = 64;
                canvas.height = 64;
                const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
                
                // Base color similar to ground
                const baseGray = 60 + Math.random() * 30;
                ctx.fillStyle = `rgb(${baseGray + 10}, ${baseGray + 5}, ${baseGray})`;
                ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 64, 64);
                
                // Add natural color variation matching terrain
                for (let i = 0; i < 50; i++) {
                    const x = Math.random() * 64;
                    const y = Math.random() * 64;
                    const size = 3 + Math.random() * 12;
                    const variation = Math.random() * 30 - 15;
                    const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(x, y, 0, x, y, size);
                    gradient.addColorStop(0, `rgb(${baseGray + variation + 10}, ${baseGray + variation}, ${baseGray + variation - 5})`);
                    gradient.addColorStop(1, 'transparent');
                    ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
                    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 64, 64);
                }
                
                // Add dirt/moss patches at bottom if embedded
                if (embedInGround) {
                    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(74, 61, 48, 0.4)';
                    ctx.fillRect(0, 48, 64, 16);
                }
                
                const texture = new THREE.CanvasTexture(canvas);
                return new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ map: texture });
            }
            
            // Place rocks naturally embedded in terrain (not blocking zombie paths much)
            // Smaller decorative rocks scattered around
            for (let i = 0; i < 60; i++) {
                const angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
                // Keep rocks more to the sides, less in direct paths
                const dist = HILLTOP_RADIUS + 8 + Math.random() * (SLOPE_OUTER_RADIUS - HILLTOP_RADIUS - 30);
                const t = (dist - HILLTOP_RADIUS) / (SLOPE_OUTER_RADIUS - HILLTOP_RADIUS);
                const baseY = HILLTOP_Y - Math.pow(t, 0.7) * (HILLTOP_Y - SLOPE_BOTTOM_Y);
                
                const x = Math.cos(angle) * dist;
                const z = Math.sin(angle) * dist;
                const noiseY = terrainNoise(x, z, 0.08, Math.sin(t * Math.PI) * 2.5) + 
                               terrainNoise(x + 100, z + 100, 0.15, Math.sin(t * Math.PI) * 1.25);
                
                // Smaller decorative rocks - embedded in ground
                const scale = 0.3 + Math.random() * 0.8;
                const rockGeo = createNaturalRock(scale);
                const rock = new THREE.Mesh(rockGeo, createRockMaterial(true));
                
                rock.scale.set(
                    scale * (0.8 + Math.random() * 0.4), 
                    scale * (0.4 + Math.random() * 0.3), // Flatter 
                    scale * (0.8 + Math.random() * 0.4)
                );
                
                // Embed partially in ground
                rock.position.set(x, baseY + noiseY - scale * 0.15, z);
                rock.rotation.set(
                    (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.3, 
                    Math.random() * Math.PI * 2, 
                    (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.3
                );
                scene.add(rock);
            }
            
            // Larger rocks as natural terrain features (sparse, not blocking paths)
            for (let i = 0; i < 15; i++) {
                const angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
                const dist = HILLTOP_RADIUS + 20 + Math.random() * 50;
                const t = (dist - HILLTOP_RADIUS) / (SLOPE_OUTER_RADIUS - HILLTOP_RADIUS);
                const baseY = HILLTOP_Y - Math.pow(t, 0.7) * (HILLTOP_Y - SLOPE_BOTTOM_Y);
                
                const cx = Math.cos(angle) * dist;
                const cz = Math.sin(angle) * dist;
                const noiseY = terrainNoise(cx, cz, 0.08, Math.sin(t * Math.PI) * 2.5);
                
                // Create a natural rock formation - 2-3 connected rocks
                const formationSize = 2 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 2);
                for (let j = 0; j < formationSize; j++) {
                    const scale = 1.2 + Math.random() * 1.5;
                    const rockGeo = createNaturalRock(scale);
                    const rock = new THREE.Mesh(rockGeo, createRockMaterial(true));
                    
                    rock.scale.set(
                        scale * (0.7 + Math.random() * 0.3), 
                        scale * (0.35 + Math.random() * 0.25), // Very flat, like boulders
                        scale * (0.7 + Math.random() * 0.3)
                    );
                    
                    // Cluster rocks together naturally
                    const offsetX = (Math.random() - 0.5) * scale * 1.5;
                    const offsetZ = (Math.random() - 0.5) * scale * 1.5;
                    
                    // Deeply embed in ground
                    rock.position.set(cx + offsetX, baseY + noiseY - scale * 0.25, cz + offsetZ);
                    rock.rotation.set(
                        (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.2, 
                        Math.random() * Math.PI * 2, 
                        (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.2
                    );
                    scene.add(rock);
                }
            }
            
            // Distant flat ground - wasteland beyond the slope
            const groundGeometry = new THREE.RingGeometry(SLOPE_OUTER_RADIUS, 400, 32, 1);
            const groundTex = naturalGroundTexture.clone();
            groundTex.repeat.set(20, 20);
            const groundMaterial = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ map: groundTex });
            const ground = new THREE.Mesh(groundGeometry, groundMaterial);
            ground.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2;
            ground.position.set(0, SLOPE_BOTTOM_Y, 0);
            scene.add(ground);
            
            // Apocalyptic distant ruins/debris scattered around - Minecraft style cobblestone
            function createCobblestoneTexture() {
                const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
                canvas.width = 32;
                canvas.height = 32;
                const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
                ctx.fillStyle = '#6a6a6a';
                ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 32, 32);
                const stoneColors = ['#5a5a5a', '#7a7a7a', '#4a4a4a', '#8a8a8a'];
                for (let x = 0; x < 32; x += 4) {
                    for (let y = 0; y < 32; y += 4) {
                        ctx.fillStyle = stoneColors[Math.floor(Math.random() * stoneColors.length)];
                        ctx.fillRect(x, y, 4, 4);
                    }
                }
                const texture = new THREE.CanvasTexture(canvas);
                texture.magFilter = THREE.NearestFilter;
                texture.minFilter = THREE.NearestFilter;
                return texture;
            }
            
            const cobbleTex = createCobblestoneTexture();
            const debrisMaterial = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ map: cobbleTex });
            for (let i = 0; i < 25; i++) {
                const angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
                const dist = 130 + Math.random() * 120;
                const debrisGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(
                    2 + Math.random() * 6,
                    1 + Math.random() * 5,
                    2 + Math.random() * 6
                );
                const debris = new THREE.Mesh(debrisGeo, debrisMaterial);
                debris.position.set(
                    Math.cos(angle) * dist,
                    SLOPE_BOTTOM_Y + Math.random() * 2,
                    Math.sin(angle) * dist
                );
                debris.rotation.y = Math.random() * Math.PI;
                debris.rotation.z = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.3;
                scene.add(debris);
            }
            
            // Dead trees - Minecraft style (blocky)
            function createWoodTexture() {
                const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
                canvas.width = 16;
                canvas.height = 16;
                const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
                ctx.fillStyle = '#4a3a2a';
                ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 16, 16);
                const woodColors = ['#3a2a1a', '#5a4a3a', '#4a3a2a'];
                for (let y = 0; y < 16; y += 2) {
                    ctx.fillStyle = woodColors[Math.floor(Math.random() * woodColors.length)];
                    ctx.fillRect(0, y, 16, 2);
                }
                const texture = new THREE.CanvasTexture(canvas);
                texture.magFilter = THREE.NearestFilter;
                texture.minFilter = THREE.NearestFilter;
                return texture;
            }
            
            const woodTex = createWoodTexture();
            const treeMaterial = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ map: woodTex });
            for (let i = 0; i < 20; i++) {
                const angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
                const dist = 130 + Math.random() * 100;
                const treeHeight = 6 + Math.random() * 6;
                
                // Blocky trunk - Minecraft style
                const trunkGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(1.5, treeHeight, 1.5);
                const trunk = new THREE.Mesh(trunkGeo, treeMaterial);
                trunk.position.set(
                    Math.cos(angle) * dist,
                    SLOPE_BOTTOM_Y + treeHeight / 2,
                    Math.sin(angle) * dist
                );
                trunk.rotation.z = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.15;
                scene.add(trunk);
                
                // Blocky dead branches
                for (let b = 0; b < 2 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 2); b++) {
                    const branchLen = 1.5 + Math.random() * 2;
                    const branchGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(branchLen, 0.5, 0.5);
                    const branch = new THREE.Mesh(branchGeo, treeMaterial);
                    branch.position.copy(trunk.position);
                    branch.position.y = SLOPE_BOTTOM_Y + treeHeight * 0.4 + b * 2;
                    branch.position.x += (Math.random() - 0.5) * branchLen;
                    branch.rotation.z = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.8;
                    scene.add(branch);
                }
            }
            
            // Distant water/swamp area - Minecraft style murky water
            function createWaterTexture() {
                const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
                canvas.width = 32;
                canvas.height = 32;
                const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
                ctx.fillStyle = '#2a4a4a';
                ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 32, 32);
                const waterColors = ['#1a3a3a', '#3a5a5a', '#2a4a4a', '#204040'];
                for (let x = 0; x < 32; x += 4) {
                    for (let y = 0; y < 32; y += 4) {
                        ctx.fillStyle = waterColors[Math.floor(Math.random() * waterColors.length)];
                        ctx.fillRect(x, y, 4, 4);
                    }
                }
                const texture = new THREE.CanvasTexture(canvas);
                texture.wrapS = THREE.RepeatWrapping;
                texture.wrapT = THREE.RepeatWrapping;
                texture.magFilter = THREE.NearestFilter;
                texture.minFilter = THREE.NearestFilter;
                return texture;
            }
            
            const mcWaterTex = createWaterTexture();
            mcWaterTex.repeat.set(20, 20);
            const waterRingGeometry = new THREE.RingGeometry(250, 500, 32);
            const waterRingMaterial = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ map: mcWaterTex, transparent: true, opacity: 0.85, side: THREE.DoubleSide });
            const waterRing = new THREE.Mesh(waterRingGeometry, waterRingMaterial);
            waterRing.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2;
            waterRing.position.set(0, SLOPE_BOTTOM_Y - 0.5, 0);
            scene.add(waterRing);
            
            // Sandbags around player position - Minecraft style wool/sand blocks
            // Store sandbag positions for zombie collision
            const sandbagPositions = [];
            const SANDBAG_RADIUS = 4;
            const SANDBAG_COLLISION_RADIUS = 1.5; // Collision radius per sandbag
            
            function createSandbagTexture() {
                const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
                canvas.width = 16;
                canvas.height = 16;
                const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
                ctx.fillStyle = '#c0a060';
                ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 16, 16);
                const sandColors = ['#b09050', '#d0b070', '#a08040', '#c0a060'];
                for (let x = 0; x < 16; x += 2) {
                    for (let y = 0; y < 16; y += 2) {
                        ctx.fillStyle = sandColors[Math.floor(Math.random() * sandColors.length)];
                        ctx.fillRect(x, y, 2, 2);
                    }
                }
                const texture = new THREE.CanvasTexture(canvas);
                texture.magFilter = THREE.NearestFilter;
                texture.minFilter = THREE.NearestFilter;
                return texture;
            }
            
            const sandbagTex = createSandbagTexture();
            const sandbagGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(2, 1, 1);
            const sandbagMaterial = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ map: sandbagTex });
            
            for (let i = 0; i < 12; i++) {
                const angle = (i / 12) * Math.PI * 2;
                const radius = SANDBAG_RADIUS;
                const sandbag = new THREE.Mesh(sandbagGeometry, sandbagMaterial);
                const sx = Math.cos(angle) * radius;
                const sz = Math.sin(angle) * radius;
                sandbag.position.set(sx, 10.7, sz);
                sandbag.rotation.y = angle + Math.PI / 2;
                scene.add(sandbag);
                
                // Store position for collision
                sandbagPositions.push({ x: sx, z: sz, angle: angle });
                
                // Add second layer for defense
                if (i % 2 === 0) {
                    const sandbag2 = new THREE.Mesh(sandbagGeometry, sandbagMaterial);
                    sandbag2.position.set(sx, 11.5, sz);
                    sandbag2.rotation.y = angle + Math.PI / 2 + 0.2;
                    scene.add(sandbag2);
                }
            };
            
            // Add decorations at cardinal directions on sandbags
            // Cardinal directions: East (i=0), North (i=3), West (i=6), South (i=9)
            
            // EAST (angle=0): Radio/Communication Equipment
            const eastAngle = 0;
            const eastX = Math.cos(eastAngle) * SANDBAG_RADIUS;
            const eastZ = Math.sin(eastAngle) * SANDBAG_RADIUS;
            const radioGroup = new THREE.Group();
            
            // Radio box body - larger and more visible
            const radioBoxGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.6, 0.45, 0.35);
            const radioMat = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ color: 0x2a3a2a });
            const radioBox = new THREE.Mesh(radioBoxGeo, radioMat);
            radioBox.position.set(0, 0.22, 0.1);
            radioGroup.add(radioBox);
            
            // Radio front panel detail
            const panelGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.5, 0.35, 0.02);
            const panelMat = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ color: 0x1a2a1a });
            const panel = new THREE.Mesh(panelGeo, panelMat);
            panel.position.set(0, 0.22, 0.28);
            radioGroup.add(panel);
            
            // Radio dials/screen - glowing green display
            const screenGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.25, 0.12, 0.02);
            const screenMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ color: 0x2a6a2a });
            const screen = new THREE.Mesh(screenGeo, screenMat);
            screen.position.set(0, 0.28, 0.3);
            radioGroup.add(screen);
            
            // Dials/knobs on front
            const knobMat = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ color: 0x444444 });
            const knob1Geo = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.04, 0.04, 0.03, 8);
            const knob1 = new THREE.Mesh(knob1Geo, knobMat);
            knob1.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
            knob1.position.set(-0.15, 0.12, 0.3);
            radioGroup.add(knob1);
            
            const knob2 = new THREE.Mesh(knob1Geo, knobMat);
            knob2.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
            knob2.position.set(0.15, 0.12, 0.3);
            radioGroup.add(knob2);
            
            // Speaker grille
            const grilleMat = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ color: 0x1a1a1a });
            const grilleGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.12, 0.12, 0.02);
            const grille = new THREE.Mesh(grilleGeo, grilleMat);
            grille.position.set(0, 0.12, 0.3);
            radioGroup.add(grille);
            
            // Antenna - taller and more prominent
            const antennaMat = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ color: 0x333333 });
            const antennaGeo = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.025, 0.025, 1.2, 6);
            const antenna = new THREE.Mesh(antennaGeo, antennaMat);
            antenna.position.set(0.2, 0.8, 0);
            radioGroup.add(antenna);
            
            // Antenna base
            const antennaBaseGeo = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.05, 0.05, 0.08, 8);
            const antennaBase = new THREE.Mesh(antennaBaseGeo, antennaMat);
            antennaBase.position.set(0.2, 0.48, 0);
            radioGroup.add(antennaBase);
            
            // Antenna tip - blinking red light
            const antennaTipGeo = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.05, 6, 6);
            const antennaTip = new THREE.Mesh(antennaTipGeo, new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ color: 0xff0000 }));
            antennaTip.position.set(0.2, 1.4, 0);
            radioGroup.add(antennaTip);
            
            // Coiled wire/cable
            const wireMat = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ color: 0x222222 });
            const wireGeo = new THREE.TorusGeometry(0.08, 0.015, 8, 12);
            const wire = new THREE.Mesh(wireGeo, wireMat);
            wire.position.set(-0.25, 0.1, 0.2);
            wire.rotation.y = Math.PI / 4;
            radioGroup.add(wire);
            
            // Placed at 12.0 so it sits ON TOP of the sandbag, not hidden inside it
            radioGroup.position.set(eastX, 12.0, eastZ);
            radioGroup.rotation.y = -Math.PI / 2; // Face the player (center at -X relative to East)
            scene.add(radioGroup);
            
            // NORTH (angle=π/2): Thick Wooden Stick - tilted/slanted
            const northAngle = Math.PI / 2;
            const northX = Math.cos(northAngle) * SANDBAG_RADIUS;
            const northZ = Math.sin(northAngle) * SANDBAG_RADIUS;
            const stickGroup = new THREE.Group();

            stickWoodCanvas.width = 32;

            // Brown wood base

                stickWoodCtx.fillRect(0, i * 5 + Math.random() * 2, 32, 2);

            stickWoodCtx.fillStyle = '#3a2a1a';
            for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
                const x = Math.random() * 20 + 6;
                const y = Math.random() * 50 + 7;

                stickWoodCtx.arc(x, y, 3 + Math.random() * 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);

            }
            const stickWoodTex = new THREE.CanvasTexture(stickWoodCanvas);
            stickWoodTex.magFilter = THREE.NearestFilter;
            const stickWoodMat = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ map: stickWoodTex });
            
            // Thick wooden stick - much thicker than the old pole
            const stickGeo = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.08, 0.1, 2.5, 8);
            const stick = new THREE.Mesh(stickGeo, stickWoodMat);
            stick.position.y = 1.25;

            // Top of stick - slightly rounded/worn

            top.scale.y = 0.6;

            // Tilt the container strongly so it's unmistakably diagonal

            stickContainer.rotation.x = 0.2; // Slight forward lean
            stickGroup.add(stickContainer);
            
            stickGroup.position.set(northX, 11.5, northZ);
            stickGroup.rotation.y = -northAngle + Math.PI/4;
            scene.add(stickGroup);
            
            // WEST (angle=π): Torn Cloth/Rag draped over sandbags
            const westAngle = Math.PI;

            const westZ = Math.sin(westAngle) * SANDBAG_RADIUS;
            const clothGroup = new THREE.Group();
            
            // Create tattered cloth texture
            const clothCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');

            clothCanvas.height = 64;
            const clothCtx = clothCanvas.getContext('2d');
            // Dirty brown/gray cloth base
            clothCtx.fillStyle = '#5a4a3a';
            clothCtx.fillRect(0, 0, 64, 64);
            // Stains and dirt patches
            clothCtx.fillStyle = '#4a3a2a';
            clothCtx.fillRect(8, 12, 20, 15);
            clothCtx.fillRect(35, 30, 18, 20);
            clothCtx.fillStyle = '#3a2a1a';
            clothCtx.fillRect(15, 40, 25, 12);
            clothCtx.fillRect(0, 5, 12, 18);
            // Lighter worn areas
            clothCtx.fillStyle = '#6a5a4a';
            clothCtx.fillRect(45, 8, 15, 10);
            clothCtx.fillRect(20, 25, 12, 8);
            // Frayed edges texture

            for (let i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
                clothCtx.fillRect(i * 8, 58, 4, 6);
                clothCtx.fillRect(i * 8 + 2, 0, 3, 4);
            }
            
            const clothTex = new THREE.CanvasTexture(clothCanvas);
            clothTex.magFilter = THREE.NearestFilter;
            const clothMat = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ 
                map: clothTex, 
                side: THREE.DoubleSide,
                transparent: true,
                opacity: 0.95
            });
            
            // Main cloth piece laid perfectly flat
            const clothMainGeo = new THREE.PlaneGeometry(1.8, 0.9);
            const clothMain = new THREE.Mesh(clothMainGeo, clothMat);
            clothMain.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2; // Lie flat
            clothGroup.add(clothMain);
            
            // Position exactly on top of the sandbag (12.0 is the top edge)
            clothGroup.position.set(westX, 12.02, westZ);
            clothGroup.rotation.y = -westAngle + Math.PI;
            scene.add(clothGroup);
            
            // SOUTH (angle=3π/2): Ammo Crates
            const southAngle = Math.PI * 1.5;
            const southX = Math.cos(southAngle) * SANDBAG_RADIUS;
            const southZ = Math.sin(southAngle) * SANDBAG_RADIUS;
            const ammoGroup = new THREE.Group();
            
            // Ammo crate texture

            ammoCanvas.width = 32;
            ammoCanvas.height = 32;
            const ammoCtx = ammoCanvas.getContext('2d');
            ammoCtx.fillStyle = '#3a4a2a';
            ammoCtx.fillRect(0, 0, 32, 32);
            // Wood grain
            ammoCtx.fillStyle = '#2a3a1a';
            for (let i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
                ammoCtx.fillRect(0, i * 4, 32, 2);
            }
            // Metal corner
            ammoCtx.fillStyle = '#555555';
            ammoCtx.fillRect(0, 0, 6, 6);
            ammoCtx.fillRect(26, 0, 6, 6);
            ammoCtx.fillRect(0, 26, 6, 6);
            ammoCtx.fillRect(26, 26, 6, 6);
            
            const ammoTex = new THREE.CanvasTexture(ammoCanvas);
            ammoTex.magFilter = THREE.NearestFilter;
            const ammoMat = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ map: ammoTex });
            
            // Main ammo crate
            const ammoCrateGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.6, 0.35, 0.4);

            ammoCrate1.position.set(0, 0.18, 0);
            ammoGroup.add(ammoCrate1);
            
            // Second smaller crate on top

            const ammoCrate2 = new THREE.Mesh(ammoCrate2Geo, ammoMat);
            ammoCrate2.position.set(0.05, 0.48, 0);
            ammoCrate2.rotation.y = 0.15;
            ammoGroup.add(ammoCrate2);
            
            // Bullet belt draped over crate
            const beltMat = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ color: 0x8a7a3a });
            for (let i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
                const bulletGeo = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.025, 0.02, 0.08, 6);
                const bullet = new THREE.Mesh(bulletGeo, beltMat);

            ammoGroup.position.set(southX, 11.5, southZ);
