            // ==================== ZOMBIE CLASS ====================
            const zombies = [];
            const ZOMBIE_HEIGHT = 1.95; // Minecraft zombie height
            const ZOMBIE_WIDTH = 0.5;
            
            // Blood splatter particle system - now cubic for Minecraft style
            const bloodParticles = [];
            
            class BloodParticle {
                constructor(position) {
                    const particleCount = 10 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 6);
                    this.particles = [];
                    this.lifetime = 0;
                    this.maxLifetime = 1.5;
                    
                    for (let i = 0; i < particleCount; i++) {
                        const size = 0.08 + Math.random() * 0.12;
                        // Cubic particles for Minecraft style
                        const geometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(size, size, size);
                        const material = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ 
                            color: new THREE.Color(0x00ff00).lerp(new THREE.Color(0x003300), Math.random() * 0.5),
                            transparent: true,
                            opacity: 1
                        });
                        const particle = new THREE.Mesh(geometry, material);
                        particle.position.copy(position);
                        
                        // Random velocity
                        particle.velocity = new THREE.Vector3(
                            (Math.random() - 0.5) * 8,
                            Math.random() * 5 + 2,
                            (Math.random() - 0.5) * 8
                        );
                        
                        scene.add(particle);
                        this.particles.push(particle);
                    }
                }
                
                update(dt) {
                    this.lifetime += dt;
                    const progress = this.lifetime / this.maxLifetime;
                    
                    for (const particle of this.particles) {
                        // Apply gravity
                        particle.velocity.y -= 15 * dt;
                        
                        // Move particle
                        particle.position.x += particle.velocity.x * dt;
                        particle.position.y += particle.velocity.y * dt;
                        particle.position.z += particle.velocity.z * dt;
                        
                        // Rotate like Minecraft particles
                        particle.rotation.x += dt * 5;
                        particle.rotation.y += dt * 3;
                        
                        // Fade out
                        particle.material.opacity = 1 - progress;
                        
                        // Shrink
                        const scale = 1 - progress * 0.5;
                        particle.scale.setScalar(scale);
                    }
                    
                    return this.lifetime < this.maxLifetime;
                }
                
                destroy() {
                    for (const particle of this.particles) {
                        scene.remove(particle);
                        particle.geometry.dispose();
                        particle.material.dispose();
                    }
                }
            }
            
            function spawnBloodEffect(position) {
                const blood = new BloodParticle(position);
                bloodParticles.push(blood);
            }
            const SPAWN_RADIUS = 100; // Zombies spawn at the edge of the slope
            const PLAYER_REACH_DIST = 4; // Distance at which zombie attacks player (at sandbags)
            // Use HILLTOP_Y and SLOPE_BOTTOM_Y defined in terrain section
            
            // Minecraft-style zombie materials
            function createMinecraftZombieMaterials() {
                // Head - green face with dark eyes (front face only)
                const headFaceCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
                headFaceCanvas.width = 32;
                headFaceCanvas.height = 32;
                const headFaceCtx = headFaceCanvas.getContext('2d');
                // Face base - green zombie skin
                headFaceCtx.fillStyle = '#5a8a4a';
                headFaceCtx.fillRect(0, 0, 32, 32);
                // Darker patches for texture
                headFaceCtx.fillStyle = '#4a7a3a';
                headFaceCtx.fillRect(0, 0, 8, 8);
                headFaceCtx.fillRect(16, 8, 8, 8);
                headFaceCtx.fillRect(8, 16, 8, 8);
                headFaceCtx.fillRect(24, 24, 8, 8);
                // Eyes - dark hollows
                headFaceCtx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a';
                headFaceCtx.fillRect(6, 10, 6, 6);
                headFaceCtx.fillRect(20, 10, 6, 6);
                // Eye pupils
                headFaceCtx.fillStyle = '#000000';
                headFaceCtx.fillRect(8, 12, 3, 3);
                headFaceCtx.fillRect(22, 12, 3, 3);
                // Nose
                headFaceCtx.fillStyle = '#4a6a3a';
                headFaceCtx.fillRect(14, 16, 4, 6);
                // Mouth
                headFaceCtx.fillStyle = '#2a2a2a';
                headFaceCtx.fillRect(10, 24, 12, 4);
                
                const headFaceTexture = new THREE.CanvasTexture(headFaceCanvas);
                headFaceTexture.magFilter = THREE.NearestFilter;
                headFaceTexture.minFilter = THREE.NearestFilter;
                
                // Head top/sides - just green skin without face features
                const headTopCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
                headTopCanvas.width = 32;
                headTopCanvas.height = 32;
                const headTopCtx = headTopCanvas.getContext('2d');
                headTopCtx.fillStyle = '#5a8a4a';
                headTopCtx.fillRect(0, 0, 32, 32);
                // Add random noise for texture instead of face-like blocks
                headTopCtx.fillStyle = '#4a7a3a';
                for (let i = 0; i < 20; i++) {
                    headTopCtx.fillRect(Math.random() * 28, Math.random() * 28, 4, 4);
                }
                
                const headTopTexture = new THREE.CanvasTexture(headTopCanvas);
                headTopTexture.magFilter = THREE.NearestFilter;
                headTopTexture.minFilter = THREE.NearestFilter;
                
                // Head side - green skin
                const headSideCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
                headSideCanvas.width = 32;
                headSideCanvas.height = 32;
                const headSideCtx = headSideCanvas.getContext('2d');
                headSideCtx.fillStyle = '#5a8a4a';
                headSideCtx.fillRect(0, 0, 32, 32);
                headSideCtx.fillStyle = '#4a7a3a';
                headSideCtx.fillRect(4, 4, 12, 10);
                headSideCtx.fillRect(16, 16, 10, 12);
                // Ear
                headSideCtx.fillStyle = '#4a6a3a';
                headSideCtx.fillRect(20, 10, 6, 10);
                
                const headSideTexture = new THREE.CanvasTexture(headSideCanvas);
                headSideTexture.magFilter = THREE.NearestFilter;
                headSideTexture.minFilter = THREE.NearestFilter;
                
                // Create materials array for head (right, left, top, bottom, front, back)
                const headMaterials = [
                    new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ map: headSideTexture }), // right
                    new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ map: headSideTexture }), // left
                    new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ map: headTopTexture }),  // top
                    new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ map: headTopTexture }),  // bottom
                    new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ map: headFaceTexture }), // front (face)
                    new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ map: headSideTexture })  // back
                ];
                
                // Body - tattered cyan shirt
                const bodyCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
                bodyCanvas.width = 32;
                bodyCanvas.height = 48;
                const bodyCtx = bodyCanvas.getContext('2d');
                // Cyan shirt
                bodyCtx.fillStyle = '#3a8a8a';
                bodyCtx.fillRect(0, 0, 32, 48);
                // Darker patches - worn texture
                bodyCtx.fillStyle = '#2a7a7a';
                bodyCtx.fillRect(4, 0, 8, 12);
                bodyCtx.fillRect(20, 16, 8, 12);
                bodyCtx.fillRect(8, 32, 12, 12);
                // Tears and holes
                bodyCtx.fillStyle = '#4a6a4a'; // Green skin showing through
                bodyCtx.fillRect(24, 36, 6, 8);
                bodyCtx.fillRect(2, 20, 4, 6);
                
                const bodyTexture = new THREE.CanvasTexture(bodyCanvas);
                bodyTexture.magFilter = THREE.NearestFilter;
                bodyTexture.minFilter = THREE.NearestFilter;
                
                // Arms - green skin
                const armCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
                armCanvas.width = 16;
                armCanvas.height = 48;
                const armCtx = armCanvas.getContext('2d');
                armCtx.fillStyle = '#5a8a4a';
                armCtx.fillRect(0, 0, 16, 48);
                // Texture variation
                armCtx.fillStyle = '#4a7a3a';
                armCtx.fillRect(0, 0, 8, 12);
                armCtx.fillRect(8, 24, 8, 12);
                
                const armTexture = new THREE.CanvasTexture(armCanvas);
                armTexture.magFilter = THREE.NearestFilter;
                armTexture.minFilter = THREE.NearestFilter;
                
                // Legs - dark blue pants
                const legCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
                legCanvas.width = 16;
                legCanvas.height = 48;
                const legCtx = legCanvas.getContext('2d');
                legCtx.fillStyle = '#2a2a5a';
                legCtx.fillRect(0, 0, 16, 48);
                // Texture
                legCtx.fillStyle = '#1a1a4a';
                legCtx.fillRect(0, 16, 8, 16);
                legCtx.fillRect(8, 32, 8, 12);
                
                const legTexture = new THREE.CanvasTexture(legCanvas);
                legTexture.magFilter = THREE.NearestFilter;
                legTexture.minFilter = THREE.NearestFilter;
                
                return {
                    head: headMaterials, // Now an array for multi-face
                    body: new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ map: bodyTexture }),
                    arm: new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ map: armTexture }),
                    leg: new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ map: legTexture })
                };
            }
            
            const mcZombieMats = createMinecraftZombieMaterials();
            
            // Create helmet materials for helmet zombies
            function createHelmetMaterials() {
                // German-style steel helmet texture
                const helmetCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
                helmetCanvas.width = 32;
                helmetCanvas.height = 32;
                const ctx = helmetCanvas.getContext('2d');
                
                // Base dark steel color
                ctx.fillStyle = '#3a3a3a';
                ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 32, 32);
                
                // Metallic highlights
                ctx.fillStyle = '#5a5a5a';
                ctx.fillRect(4, 2, 24, 8);
                ctx.fillRect(8, 10, 16, 4);
                
                // Darker shadows
                ctx.fillStyle = '#2a2a2a';
                ctx.fillRect(0, 24, 32, 8);
                ctx.fillRect(2, 16, 6, 12);
                ctx.fillRect(24, 16, 6, 12);
                
                // Scratches and wear
                ctx.fillStyle = '#4a4a4a';
                for (let i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
                    ctx.fillRect(Math.random() * 28, Math.random() * 28, 3, 1);
                }
                
                const helmetTex = new THREE.CanvasTexture(helmetCanvas);
                helmetTex.magFilter = THREE.NearestFilter;
                
                return new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ map: helmetTex });
            }
            
            const helmetMaterial = createHelmetMaterials();
            
            class Zombie {
                constructor(spawnAngle, isCrawler = false, hasHelmet = false, isRunner = false, isGiant = false, isBoneThrower = false, isScreamer = false) {
                    this.isCrawler = isCrawler;
                    this.isRunner = isRunner && !isCrawler; // Crawlers can't be runners
                    this.isGiant = isGiant && !isCrawler && !isRunner; // Giants are exclusive type
                    this.hasHelmet = hasHelmet && !isCrawler && !isGiant; // Giants don't need helmets
                    this.isBoneThrower = isBoneThrower && !isCrawler && !isGiant && !isRunner; // Bone thrower is ranged
                    this.isScreamer = isScreamer && !isCrawler && !isGiant && !isRunner && !isBoneThrower; // Screamer is ranged
                    this.isRangedZombie = this.isBoneThrower || this.isScreamer; // Flag for ranged behavior
                    this.isTransforming = false;
                    this.hasTransformed = false;
                    this.transformProgress = 0;
                    this.TRANSFORM_DISTANCE = 20; // Distance to trigger stand up
                    
                    // Ranged attack properties
                    this.rangedAttackCooldown = 0;
                    // Add random variation to bone thrower range (±30%)
                    const rangeVariation = this.isBoneThrower ? (0.7 + Math.random() * 0.6) : 1;
                    this.rangedAttackRange = this.isBoneThrower ? (35 * rangeVariation) : 60; // Attack distance with random variation - Screamer range doubled
                    this.rangedMinRange = this.isBoneThrower ? (12 * rangeVariation) : 20; // Min distance with random variation - Screamer min range doubled
                    this.isPreparingAttack = false;
                    this.prepareTimer = 0;
                    this.PREPARE_DURATION = this.isBoneThrower ? 0.6 : 0.8;
                    
                    // Calculate spawn position from angle
                    const x = Math.cos(spawnAngle) * SPAWN_RADIUS;
                    const z = Math.sin(spawnAngle) * SPAWN_RADIUS;
                    
                    // Body group
                    this.group = new THREE.Group();
                    this.group.rotation.order = 'YXZ'; // Fix rotation axis order so X is always local pitch
                    
                    // Minecraft zombie scale (1 block = 1 unit) - varies by type
                    let scale = 1.95;
                    
                    // Adjust scale for different zombie types
                    if (isGiant) {
                        scale = 6.4; // Giant is MASSIVE! (doubled from 3.2)
                    } else if (isRunner) {
                        scale = 1.7; // Runner is slightly leaner
                    }
                    
                    if (isCrawler) {
                        // Crawling Minecraft zombie - horizontal body
                        // Head (8x8x8 pixels = 0.5 units in MC scale)
                        const headGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.5 * scale, 0.5 * scale, 0.5 * scale);
                        const head = new THREE.Mesh(headGeo, mcZombieMats.head);
                        head.position.set(0, 0.35, 0.6);
                        this.group.add(head);
                        this.head = head;
                        
                        // Torso (8x12x4 pixels)
                        const torsoGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.5 * scale, 0.25 * scale, 0.75 * scale);
                        const torso = new THREE.Mesh(torsoGeo, mcZombieMats.body);
                        torso.position.set(0, 0.2, 0);
                        this.group.add(torso);
                        
                        // Arms (reaching forward)
                        const armGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.25 * scale, 0.25 * scale, 0.75 * scale);
                        const leftArm = new THREE.Mesh(armGeo, mcZombieMats.arm);
                        leftArm.position.set(-0.38, 0.15, 0.5);
                        this.group.add(leftArm);
                        this.leftArm = leftArm;
                        
                        const rightArm = new THREE.Mesh(armGeo, mcZombieMats.arm);
                        rightArm.position.set(0.38, 0.15, 0.5);
                        this.group.add(rightArm);
                        this.rightArm = rightArm;
                        
                        // Legs (dragging behind)
                        const legGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.25 * scale, 0.2 * scale, 0.75 * scale);
                        const leftLeg = new THREE.Mesh(legGeo, mcZombieMats.leg);
                        leftLeg.position.set(-0.13, 0.1, -0.5);
                        this.group.add(leftLeg);
                        this.leftLeg = leftLeg;
                        
                        const rightLeg = new THREE.Mesh(legGeo, mcZombieMats.leg);
                        rightLeg.position.set(0.13, 0.1, -0.5);
                        this.group.add(rightLeg);
                        this.rightLeg = rightLeg;
                        
                        this.zombieHeight = 0.6;
                        
                        // Store crawler parts for transformation
                        this.crawlerParts = {
                            head: head,
                            torso: torso,
                            leftArm: this.leftArm,
                            rightArm: this.rightArm,
                            leftLeg: this.leftLeg,
                            rightLeg: this.rightLeg
                        };
                    } else {
                        // Standing Minecraft zombie - classic blocky style
                        // Use special materials for runner and giant
                        const zombieMats = this.isRunner ? this.createRunnerMaterials() : 
                                          (this.isGiant ? this.createGiantMaterials() : 
                                          (this.isBoneThrower ? this.createBoneThrowerMaterials() :
                                          (this.isScreamer ? this.createScreamerMaterials() : mcZombieMats)));
                        
                        // Head (8x8x8 pixels = 0.5 units) - Giants have smaller head (30%)
                        const headScale = this.isGiant ? 0.3 : 1; // Giant head is 30% size
                        const bodyScale = this.isGiant ? (scale / 1.95) : 1; // Scale factor relative to normal zombie
                        const headGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.5 * scale * headScale, 0.5 * scale * headScale, 0.5 * scale * headScale);
                        const head = new THREE.Mesh(headGeo, zombieMats.head);
                        
                        let headYPos = 1.7 * bodyScale;
                        if (this.isGiant) {
                            // Position head correctly on top of the massive torso so it isn't hidden inside
                            const torsoTop = 1.1 * bodyScale + (0.75 * scale) / 2;
                            const headHalfHeight = (0.5 * scale * headScale) / 2;
                            headYPos = torsoTop + headHalfHeight - 0.2; // Slight overlap with neck area
                        }
                        head.position.y = headYPos;
                        this.headYPos = headYPos; // Store for hitbox calculation
                        
                        this.group.add(head);
                        this.head = head;
                        
                        // Add helmet if this is a helmet zombie
                        if (this.hasHelmet) {
                            this.createHelmet(scale);
                        }
                        
                        // Torso (8x12x4 pixels = 0.5 x 0.75 x 0.25)
                        const torsoWidth = this.isGiant ? 0.7 : (this.isRunner ? 0.4 : 0.5);
                        const torsoGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(torsoWidth * scale, 0.75 * scale, 0.25 * scale);
                        const torso = new THREE.Mesh(torsoGeo, zombieMats.body);
                        torso.position.y = 1.1 * bodyScale; // Giants are much taller
                        this.group.add(torso);
                        
                        // Arms (4x12x4 pixels = 0.25 x 0.75 x 0.25) - extended forward like MC zombie
                        const armWidth = this.isGiant ? 0.35 : (this.isRunner ? 0.2 : 0.25);
                        const armGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(armWidth * scale, 0.75 * scale, 0.25 * scale);
                        
                        // Left arm pivot - scale offsets proportionally for giants
                        const armOffsetX = (this.isGiant ? 0.55 : (this.isRunner ? 0.32 : 0.38)) * bodyScale;
                        const armOffsetY = 1.35 * bodyScale;
                        this.leftArmPivot = new THREE.Group();
                        this.leftArmPivot.position.set(-armOffsetX, armOffsetY, 0);
                        const leftArm = new THREE.Mesh(armGeo, zombieMats.arm);
                        leftArm.position.y = -0.375 * bodyScale; // Scale offset!
                        this.leftArmPivot.add(leftArm);
                        this.leftArmPivot.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2; // Arms extended forward
                        this.group.add(this.leftArmPivot);
                        this.leftArm = leftArm;
                        
                        // Right arm pivot
                        this.rightArmPivot = new THREE.Group();
                        this.rightArmPivot.position.set(armOffsetX, armOffsetY, 0);
                        const rightArm = new THREE.Mesh(armGeo, zombieMats.arm);
                        rightArm.position.y = -0.375 * bodyScale; // Scale offset!
                        this.rightArmPivot.add(rightArm);
                        this.rightArmPivot.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2; // Arms extended forward
                        this.group.add(this.rightArmPivot);
                        this.rightArm = rightArm;
                        
                        // Legs (4x12x4 pixels = 0.25 x 0.75 x 0.25)
                        const legWidth = this.isGiant ? 0.35 : 0.25;
                        const legGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(legWidth * scale, 0.75 * scale, 0.25 * scale);
                        
                        // Left leg pivot - scale offsets proportionally for giants
                        const legOffsetX = (this.isGiant ? 0.22 : 0.13) * bodyScale;
                        const legOffsetY = 0.75 * bodyScale;
                        this.leftLegPivot = new THREE.Group();
                        this.leftLegPivot.position.set(-legOffsetX, legOffsetY, 0);
                        const leftLeg = new THREE.Mesh(legGeo, zombieMats.leg);
                        leftLeg.position.y = -0.375 * bodyScale; // Scale offset!
                        this.leftLegPivot.add(leftLeg);
                        this.group.add(this.leftLegPivot);
                        this.leftLeg = leftLeg;
                        
                        // Right leg pivot
                        this.rightLegPivot = new THREE.Group();
                        this.rightLegPivot.position.set(legOffsetX, legOffsetY, 0);
                        const rightLeg = new THREE.Mesh(legGeo, zombieMats.leg);
                        rightLeg.position.y = -0.375 * bodyScale; // Scale offset!
                        this.rightLegPivot.add(rightLeg);
                        this.group.add(this.rightLegPivot);
                        this.rightLeg = rightLeg;
                        
                        this.zombieHeight = this.isGiant ? ZOMBIE_HEIGHT * (scale / 1.95) : ZOMBIE_HEIGHT; // Giant scales with body
                    }
                    
                    this.group.position.set(x, SLOPE_BOTTOM_Y, z); // Start at bottom of slope
                    scene.add(this.group);
                    
                    // Set health based on type
                    if (isGiant) {
                        this.health = config.gameplay.zombieHealth * 3; // Giants have 3x health
                    } else if (isRunner) {
                        this.health = Math.max(1, config.gameplay.zombieHealth - 1); // Runners have less health
                    } else if (isBoneThrower || isScreamer) {
                        this.health = config.gameplay.zombieHealth; // Ranged zombies have normal health
                    } else {
                        this.health = config.gameplay.zombieHealth;
                    }
                    
                    // Set speed based on type
                    if (isGiant) {
                        this.speed = 1.8 * config.gameplay.zombieSpeed; // Giants are slower
                    } else if (isRunner) {
                        this.speed = 6 * config.gameplay.zombieSpeed; // Runners are FAST!
                    } else if (isBoneThrower) {
                        this.speed = 4 * config.gameplay.zombieSpeed; // Bone throwers are slow
                    } else if (isScreamer) {
                        this.speed = 2.2 * config.gameplay.zombieSpeed; // Screamers are slow
                    } else {
                        this.speed = (isCrawler ? 2.25 : 3) * config.gameplay.zombieSpeed;
                    }
                    this.runSpeed = 4.5 * config.gameplay.zombieSpeed; // Speed after transformation
                    this.alive = true;
                    this.walkPhase = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
                    this.deathTime = 0;
                    this.dying = false;
                    this.attackCooldown = 0;
                    this.groanTimer = Math.random() * 3; // Random initial groan delay
                    this.groanInterval = 2 + Math.random() * 2; // Groan every 2-4 seconds
                    
                    // Knockback state
                    this.isKnockedBack = false;
                    this.knockbackVelocity = new THREE.Vector3();
                    this.knockbackTimer = 0;
                    this.isTumbling = false;
                    this.tumbleRotation = 0;
                    this.knockbackRecoveryTimer = 0;
                    
                    // Hit reaction state (flinch when shot)
                    this.isHitReacting = false;
                    this.hitReactTimer = 0;
                    this.hitReactDirection = new THREE.Vector3();
                    this.originalRotationX = 0;
                    this.originalRotationZ = 0;
                    
                    // Attack animation state - synced with damage timing
                    this.isDoingAttackSwing = false;
                    this.attackAnimProgress = 0;
                    this.ATTACK_ANIM_DURATION = 0.6; // Duration of one attack swing
                    
                    // Climbing state - zombies must climb sandbags before attacking
                    this.isClimbing = false;
                    this.climbProgress = 0;
                    this.hasClimbed = false;
                    this.climbStartY = 0;
                    this.CLIMB_DURATION = this.isGiant ? 2.0 : (this.isRunner ? 0.7 : 1.2); // Time to climb over sandbags
                    this.attackDamage = this.isGiant ? 35 : (this.isRunner ? 10 : (isCrawler ? 8 : 15)); // Damage per attack
                }

                // Create helmet mesh for helmet zombies
                createHelmet(scale) {
                    const helmetGroup = new THREE.Group();
                    
                    // Main helmet dome - slightly larger than head
                    const domeGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.55 * scale, 0.35 * scale, 0.55 * scale);
                    const dome = new THREE.Mesh(domeGeo, helmetMaterial);
                    dome.position.y = 0.1;
                    helmetGroup.add(dome);
                    
                    // Helmet rim/brim
                    const rimGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.6 * scale, 0.08 * scale, 0.6 * scale);
                    const rim = new THREE.Mesh(rimGeo, helmetMaterial);
                    rim.position.y = -0.08;
                    helmetGroup.add(rim);
                    
                    // Front visor/peak
                    const visorGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.5 * scale, 0.06 * scale, 0.15 * scale);
                    const visor = new THREE.Mesh(visorGeo, helmetMaterial);
                    visor.position.set(0, -0.05, 0.32);
                    visor.rotation.x = -0.2;
                    helmetGroup.add(visor);
                    
                    // Side flaps for that German helmet look
                    const flapGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.08 * scale, 0.2 * scale, 0.4 * scale);
                    const leftFlap = new THREE.Mesh(flapGeo, helmetMaterial);
                    leftFlap.position.set(-0.28, -0.05, 0);
                    helmetGroup.add(leftFlap);
                    
                    const rightFlap = new THREE.Mesh(flapGeo, helmetMaterial);
                    rightFlap.position.set(0.28, -0.05, 0);
                    helmetGroup.add(rightFlap);
                    
                    // Position helmet on head
                    helmetGroup.position.y = 1.85;
                    this.group.add(helmetGroup);
                    this.helmetMesh = helmetGroup;
                            this.hadHelmet = true; // Track that this zombie originally had a helmet
                }
                
                // Remove helmet with visual effect
                removeHelmet() {
                    if (!this.helmetMesh || !this.hasHelmet) return;
                    
                    this.hasHelmet = false;
                    
                    // Animate helmet flying off
                    const helmet = this.helmetMesh;
                    const startPos = helmet.position.clone();
                    const worldPos = new THREE.Vector3();
                    helmet.getWorldPosition(worldPos);
                    
                    // Remove from zombie group and add to scene for independent animation
                    this.group.remove(helmet);
                    helmet.position.copy(worldPos);
                    scene.add(helmet);
                    
                    // Random fly-off direction
                    const flyDir = new THREE.Vector3(
                        (Math.random() - 0.5) * 8,
                        5 + Math.random() * 3,
                        (Math.random() - 0.5) * 8
                    );
                    
                    let flyTime = 0;
                    const animateHelmet = () => {
                        flyTime += 0.016;
                        
                        // Apply velocity with gravity
                        flyDir.y -= 15 * 0.016;
                        helmet.position.add(flyDir.clone().multiplyScalar(0.016));
                        
                        // Spin the helmet
                        helmet.rotation.x += 0.3;
                        helmet.rotation.y += 0.2;
                        helmet.rotation.z += 0.15;
                        
                        if (flyTime < 2) {
                            requestAnimationFrame(animateHelmet);
                        } else {
                            // Remove helmet after animation
                            scene.remove(helmet);
                        }
                    };
                    animateHelmet();
                    
                    this.helmetMesh = null;
                }
                
                // Transform crawler to standing runner
                transformToRunner() {
                    if (!this.isCrawler || this.hasTransformed || this.isTransforming) return;
                    
                    this.isTransforming = true;
                    this.transformProgress = 0;
                    
                    // Store original Y for animation
                    this.transformStartY = this.group.position.y;
                }
                
                // Build standing body (called during transformation)
                buildStandingBody() {
                    const scale = 1.0;
                    
                    // Remove crawler parts
                    if (this.crawlerParts) {
                        Object.values(this.crawlerParts).forEach(part => {
                            if (part && part.parent) {
                                this.group.remove(part);
                            }
                        });
                    }
                    
                    // Head (8x8x8 pixels = 0.5 units)
                    const headGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.5 * scale, 0.5 * scale, 0.5 * scale);
                    const head = new THREE.Mesh(headGeo, mcZombieMats.head);
                    head.position.y = 1.7;
                    this.group.add(head);
                    this.head = head;
                    
                    // Torso (8x12x4 pixels = 0.5 x 0.75 x 0.25)
                    const torsoGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.5 * scale, 0.75 * scale, 0.25 * scale);
                    const torso = new THREE.Mesh(torsoGeo, mcZombieMats.body);
                    torso.position.y = 1.1;
                    this.group.add(torso);
                    
                    // Arms (4x12x4 pixels = 0.25 x 0.75 x 0.25) - extended forward like MC zombie
                    const armGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.25 * scale, 0.75 * scale, 0.25 * scale);
                    
                    // Left arm pivot
                    this.leftArmPivot = new THREE.Group();
                    this.leftArmPivot.position.set(-0.38, 1.35, 0);
                    const leftArm = new THREE.Mesh(armGeo, mcZombieMats.arm);
                    leftArm.position.y = -0.375;
                    this.leftArmPivot.add(leftArm);
                    this.leftArmPivot.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2; // Arms extended forward
                    this.group.add(this.leftArmPivot);
                    this.leftArm = leftArm;
                    
                    // Right arm pivot
                    this.rightArmPivot = new THREE.Group();
                    this.rightArmPivot.position.set(0.38, 1.35, 0);
                    const rightArm = new THREE.Mesh(armGeo, mcZombieMats.arm);
                    rightArm.position.y = -0.375;
                    this.rightArmPivot.add(rightArm);
                    this.rightArmPivot.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2; // Arms extended forward
                    this.group.add(this.rightArmPivot);
                    this.rightArm = rightArm;
                    
                    // Legs (4x12x4 pixels = 0.25 x 0.75 x 0.25)
                    const legGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.25 * scale, 0.75 * scale, 0.25 * scale);
                    
                    // Left leg pivot
                    this.leftLegPivot = new THREE.Group();
                    this.leftLegPivot.position.set(-0.13, 0.75, 0);
                    const leftLeg = new THREE.Mesh(legGeo, mcZombieMats.leg);
                    leftLeg.position.y = -0.375;
                    this.leftLegPivot.add(leftLeg);
                    this.group.add(this.leftLegPivot);
                    this.leftLeg = leftLeg;
                    
                    // Right leg pivot
                    this.rightLegPivot = new THREE.Group();
                    this.rightLegPivot.position.set(0.13, 0.75, 0);
                    const rightLeg = new THREE.Mesh(legGeo, mcZombieMats.leg);
                    rightLeg.position.y = -0.375;
                    this.rightLegPivot.add(rightLeg);
                    this.group.add(this.rightLegPivot);
                    this.rightLeg = rightLeg;
                    
                    this.zombieHeight = ZOMBIE_HEIGHT;
                    this.isCrawler = false;
                    this.hasTransformed = true;
                    this.isTransforming = false;
                    this.speed = this.runSpeed; // Now runs fast!
                }
                
                update(dt) {
                    // Handle knockback state
                    if (this.isKnockedBack) {
                        this.knockbackTimer -= dt;
                        
                        // Apply knockback velocity with gravity
                        this.knockbackVelocity.y -= 25 * dt; // Gravity
                        
                        // Move zombie
                        this.group.position.x += this.knockbackVelocity.x * dt;
                        this.group.position.z += this.knockbackVelocity.z * dt;
                        this.group.position.y += this.knockbackVelocity.y * dt;
                        
                        // Calculate ground height at current position
                        const dist = Math.sqrt(this.group.position.x ** 2 + this.group.position.z ** 2);
                        let groundY;
                        if (dist <= 6) {
                            groundY = 10;
                        } else if (dist >= 120) {
                            groundY = -15;
                        } else {
                            const t = (dist - 6) / (120 - 6);
                            groundY = 9.5 - Math.pow(t, 0.7) * (9.5 - (-15)) + 0.5;
                        }
                        
                        // Check ground collision
                        if (this.group.position.y <= groundY) {
                            this.group.position.y = groundY;
                            this.knockbackVelocity.y = 0;
                            // Reduce horizontal velocity (friction)
                            this.knockbackVelocity.x *= 0.85;
                            this.knockbackVelocity.z *= 0.85;
                        }
                        
                        // Tumbling animation
                        if (this.isTumbling) {
                            this.tumbleRotation += dt * 8;
                            this.group.rotation.x = this.tumbleRotation;
                            // Side roll effect
                            this.group.rotation.z = Math.sin(this.tumbleRotation * 0.5) * 0.5;
                        } else {
                            // Just pushed back, stagger animation
                            this.group.rotation.x = Math.sin(this.knockbackTimer * 10) * 0.3;
                        }
                        
                        // End knockback
                        if (this.knockbackTimer <= 0 && this.group.position.y <= groundY + 0.1) {
                            this.isKnockedBack = false;
                            this.knockbackRecoveryTimer = this.isTumbling ? 1.5 : 0.5; // Recovery time
                            this.isTumbling = false;
                        }
                        return;
                    }
                    
                    // Hit reaction animation (flinch when shot)
                    if (this.isHitReacting) {
                        this.hitReactTimer -= dt;
                        
                        // Flinch animation - body jerks back then recovers
                        const reactProgress = 1 - (this.hitReactTimer / 0.25); // 0.25s reaction
                        
                        if (reactProgress < 0.3) {
                            // Quick jerk backward - ONLY backward tilt, no side tilt
                            const jerkAmount = reactProgress / 0.3;
                            const jerkStrength = this.isGiant ? 0.04 : 0.08; // Very subtle backward lean
                            this.group.rotation.x = this.originalRotationX + jerkStrength * Math.sin(jerkAmount * Math.PI);
                            // Remove side tilt completely
                            this.group.rotation.z = 0;
                            
                            // Slight backward step
                            const stepBack = jerkAmount * (this.isGiant ? 0.3 : 0.15);
                            this.group.position.x += this.hitReactDirection.x * stepBack * dt * 10;
                            this.group.position.z += this.hitReactDirection.z * stepBack * dt * 10;
                        } else {
                            // Recovery - return to normal
                            const recoverProgress = (reactProgress - 0.3) / 0.7;
                            this.group.rotation.x = this.originalRotationX * (1 - recoverProgress);
                            this.group.rotation.z = 0; // Keep upright during recovery
                        }
                        
                        if (this.hitReactTimer <= 0) {
                            this.isHitReacting = false;
                            this.group.rotation.x = 0;
                            this.group.rotation.z = 0;
                        }
                        
                        // Still update walk animation during hit react
                        this.walkPhase += dt * 2;
                        return;
                    }
                    
                    // Recovery from knockback (getting back up)
                    if (this.knockbackRecoveryTimer > 0) {
                        this.knockbackRecoveryTimer -= dt;
                        
                        // Smoothly return to standing position
                        const recoveryProgress = 1 - (this.knockbackRecoveryTimer / 1.5);
                        this.group.rotation.x *= 0.9;
                        this.group.rotation.z *= 0.9;
                        
                        // Reset climbing state after knockback
                        if (this.knockbackRecoveryTimer <= 0) {
                            this.group.rotation.x = 0;
                            this.group.rotation.z = 0;
                            this.hasClimbed = false; // Must climb again
                            this.isClimbing = false;
                        }
                        return;
                    }
                    
                    if (this.dying) {
                        if (this.deathTime === 0) {
                            this.deathY = this.group.position.y;
                            this.fallRotated = 0;
                            this.spinRotated = 0;
                        }
                        this.deathTime += dt;
                        
                        // Different death animations based on deathType
                        const fallSpeed = 3.5;
                        const maxFallAngle = Math.PI / 2;
                        
                        if (this.isCrawler) {
                            // Crawlers just flatten and sink
                            this.group.position.y = this.deathY - Math.min(0.3, this.deathTime * 1.0);
                            // Slight random twitch
                            if (this.deathTime < 0.5) {
                                this.group.rotation.z = Math.sin(this.deathTime * 20) * 0.1 * (1 - this.deathTime * 2);
                            }
                        } else {
                            // Standing zombie death animations
                            switch (this.deathType) {
                                case 'backward':
                                    // Fall backward (classic)
                                    if (this.fallRotated > -maxFallAngle) {
                                        const rot = -dt * fallSpeed;
                                        this.group.rotateX(rot);
                                        this.fallRotated += rot;
                                    }
                                    this.group.position.y = this.deathY - Math.min(0.4, this.deathTime * 1.5);
                                    break;
                                    
                                case 'forward':
                                    // Fall forward (face plant)
                                    if (this.fallRotated < maxFallAngle) {
                                        const rot = dt * fallSpeed;
                                        this.group.rotateX(rot);
                                        this.fallRotated += rot;
                                    }
                                    this.group.position.y = this.deathY - Math.min(0.5, this.deathTime * 1.8);
                                    break;
                                    
                                case 'left':
                                    // Fall to the left side
                                    if (this.fallRotated < maxFallAngle) {
                                        const rot = dt * fallSpeed;
                                        this.group.rotateZ(rot);
                                        this.fallRotated += rot;
                                    }
                                    this.group.position.y = this.deathY - Math.min(0.35, this.deathTime * 1.2);
                                    break;
                                    
                                case 'right':
                                    // Fall to the right side
                                    if (this.fallRotated > -maxFallAngle) {
                                        const rot = -dt * fallSpeed;
                                        this.group.rotateZ(rot);
                                        this.fallRotated += rot;
                                    }
                                    this.group.position.y = this.deathY - Math.min(0.35, this.deathTime * 1.2);
                                    break;
                                    
                                case 'spin':
                                    // Spin and collapse (dramatic death)
                                    if (this.deathTime < 0.8) {
                                        this.group.rotateY(dt * 8);
                                        this.spinRotated += dt * 8;
                                    }
                                    if (this.fallRotated > -maxFallAngle && this.deathTime > 0.3) {
                                        const rot = -dt * fallSpeed * 1.5;
                                        this.group.rotateX(rot);
                                        this.fallRotated += rot;
                                    }
                                    this.group.position.y = this.deathY - Math.min(0.5, this.deathTime * 2);
                                    break;
                            }
                        }
                        
                        // Start sinking and fading after 3 seconds
                        if (this.deathTime > 3) {
                            const sinkProgress = (this.deathTime - 3) / 4; // 4 seconds to fully sink
                            this.group.position.y -= dt * 0.4;
                            
                            // Fade out effect
                            const opacity = Math.max(0, 1 - sinkProgress);
                            if (this.originalMaterials) {
                                this.originalMaterials.forEach(mat => {
                                    mat.opacity = opacity;
                                });
                            }
                        }
                        
                        // Finally remove completely once fully faded
                        if (this.deathTime > 7) {
                            this.alive = false;
                        }
                        return;
                    }
                    
                    if (!this.alive) return;
                    
                    // Check for transformation (crawler to runner when close to player)
                    if (this.isCrawler && !this.hasTransformed && !this.isTransforming) {
                        const distToCenter = Math.sqrt(this.group.position.x ** 2 + this.group.position.z ** 2);
                        if (distToCenter <= this.TRANSFORM_DISTANCE) {
                            this.transformToRunner();
                        }
                    }
                    
                    // Handle transformation animation
                    if (this.isTransforming) {
                        this.transformProgress += dt * 2; // 0.5 second transformation
                        
                        // Rising animation - zombie rises from crawling to standing
                        const riseProgress = Math.min(this.transformProgress, 1);
                        const easeOut = 1 - Math.pow(1 - riseProgress, 3);
                        
                        // Rotate the whole group from horizontal to vertical
                        this.group.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 6 * (1 - easeOut);
                        
                        // Rise up slightly during transformation
                        if (this.transformStartY !== undefined) {
                            this.group.position.y = this.transformStartY + easeOut * 0.8;
                        }
                        
                        // Complete transformation
                        if (this.transformProgress >= 1) {
                            this.group.rotation.x = 0;
                            this.buildStandingBody();
                        }
                        return; // Don't move during transformation
                    }
                    
                    // Move toward player (at origin) and climb the hill
                    // When player is collecting supplies, zombies track player's current position
                    let targetX = 0;
                    let targetZ = 0;
                    
                    if (playerMovementState !== 'idle') {
                        // Player is running to/from airdrop - zombies track player's current position
                        targetX = camera.position.x;
                        targetZ = camera.position.z;
                    }
                    
                    const toPlayer = new THREE.Vector3(targetX - this.group.position.x, 0, targetZ - this.group.position.z);
                    const distToTarget = toPlayer.length();
                    const distToCenter = Math.sqrt(this.group.position.x ** 2 + this.group.position.z ** 2);
                    
                    // Check for sandbag collision - stop at sandbag line, don't overlap
                    const atSandbags = distToCenter <= SANDBAG_RADIUS + 0.5;
                    
                    // Ranged zombie behavior - stop at range and attack from distance
                    if (this.isRangedZombie && !this.dying) {
                        // Update ranged attack cooldown
                        if (this.rangedAttackCooldown > 0) {
                            this.rangedAttackCooldown -= dt;
                        }
                        
                        // Check if in attack range
                        if (distToCenter <= this.rangedAttackRange && distToCenter >= this.rangedMinRange) {
                            // In range - stop and prepare attack
                            if (!this.isPreparingAttack && this.rangedAttackCooldown <= 0) {
                                this.isPreparingAttack = true;
                                this.prepareTimer = 0;
                            }
                            
                            // Attack preparation animation
                            if (this.isPreparingAttack) {
                                this.prepareTimer += dt;
                                
                                // Wind-up animation
                                if (this.isBoneThrower) {
                                    // Pull arm back to throw
                                    const prepProgress = Math.min(this.prepareTimer / this.PREPARE_DURATION, 1);
                                    if (this.rightArmPivot) {
                                        this.rightArmPivot.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2 + prepProgress * 1.5;
                                        this.rightArmPivot.rotation.z = prepProgress * 0.5;
                                    }
                                    // Lean back
                                    this.group.rotation.x = -prepProgress * 0.2;
                                } else if (this.isScreamer) {
                                    // Head tilts back, body tenses
                                    const prepProgress = Math.min(this.prepareTimer / this.PREPARE_DURATION, 1);
                                    if (this.head) {
                                        this.head.rotation.x = -prepProgress * 0.6;
                                    }
                                    // Arms spread out
                                    if (this.leftArmPivot && this.rightArmPivot) {
                                        this.leftArmPivot.rotation.z = -prepProgress * 0.8;
                                        this.rightArmPivot.rotation.z = prepProgress * 0.8;
                                    }
                                    this.group.rotation.x = -prepProgress * 0.15;
                                }
                                
                                // Execute attack when ready
                                if (this.prepareTimer >= this.PREPARE_DURATION) {
                                    this.executeRangedAttack();
                                    this.isPreparingAttack = false;
                                    this.rangedAttackCooldown = this.isBoneThrower ? 2.5 : 3.5;
                                    
                                    // Reset animation
                                    if (this.rightArmPivot) {
                                        this.rightArmPivot.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2;
                                        this.rightArmPivot.rotation.z = 0;
                                    }
                                    if (this.leftArmPivot) {
                                        this.leftArmPivot.rotation.z = 0;
                                    }
                                    if (this.head) {
                                        this.head.rotation.x = 0;
                                    }
                                    this.group.rotation.x = 0;
                                }
                            }
                            
                            // Face player but don't move
                            this.group.lookAt(targetX, this.group.position.y, targetZ);
                            this.walkPhase += dt * 2; // Slow idle animation
                            return;
                        } else if (distToCenter < this.rangedMinRange) {
                            // Too close - back up slowly
                            toPlayer.normalize();
                            const newX = this.group.position.x - toPlayer.x * this.speed * 0.5 * dt;
                            const newZ = this.group.position.z - toPlayer.z * this.speed * 0.5 * dt;
                            this.group.position.x = newX;
                            this.group.position.z = newZ;
                            this.group.lookAt(targetX, this.group.position.y, targetZ);
                            return;
                        }
                    }
                    
                    // Movement logic - when player is away, zombies can move freely toward player
                    // When at sandbags and player is at hilltop, start climbing
                    const playerAtHilltop = playerMovementState === 'idle';
                    
                    // Check if zombie needs to start climbing the sandbags
                    if (!this.hasClimbed && !this.isClimbing && playerAtHilltop && distToCenter <= SANDBAG_RADIUS + 0.8) {
                        this.isClimbing = true;
                        this.climbProgress = 0;
                        this.climbStartY = this.group.position.y;
                    }
                    
                    // Handle climbing animation
                    if (this.isClimbing) {
                        this.climbProgress += dt / this.CLIMB_DURATION;
                        
                        // Climbing animation - zombie pulls itself up over sandbag
                        const climbEase = 1 - Math.pow(1 - Math.min(this.climbProgress, 1), 2); // ease out
                        
                        // Rise up over sandbag (sandbags are about 1.5 units tall)
                        this.group.position.y = this.climbStartY + climbEase * 1.8;
                        
                        if (!this.isCrawler) {
                            // Standing zombie climbing animation
                            // Arms reaching forward and up to grab sandbag
                            if (this.leftArmPivot && this.rightArmPivot) {
                                const armReach = Math.sin(this.climbProgress * Math.PI * 2) * 0.3;
                                this.leftArmPivot.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2 - 0.4 + armReach;
                                this.rightArmPivot.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2 - 0.4 - armReach;
                            }
                            // Legs kicking to climb
                            if (this.leftLegPivot && this.rightLegPivot) {
                                const legKick = Math.sin(this.climbProgress * Math.PI * 4) * 0.6;
                                this.leftLegPivot.rotation.x = legKick;
                                this.rightLegPivot.rotation.x = -legKick;
                            }
                            // Body leaning forward
                            this.group.rotation.x = Math.sin(this.climbProgress * Math.PI) * 0.25;
                        } else {
                            // Crawler climbing - pulling itself up
                            const pullMotion = Math.sin(this.climbProgress * Math.PI * 3) * 0.1;
                            if (this.leftArm) this.leftArm.position.z = 0.5 + pullMotion + 0.2;
                            if (this.rightArm) this.rightArm.position.z = 0.5 - pullMotion + 0.2;
                        }
                        
                        if (this.climbProgress >= 1) {
                            this.isClimbing = false;
                            this.hasClimbed = true;
                            this.group.rotation.x = 0;
                            // Reset arm positions
                            if (this.leftArmPivot && this.rightArmPivot) {
                                this.leftArmPivot.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2;
                                this.rightArmPivot.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2;
                            }
                        }
                        // Don't continue with normal movement while climbing
                        // but still update walk phase for animation
                        this.walkPhase += dt * 3;
                        
                        // Face player while climbing
                        this.group.lookAt(targetX, this.group.position.y, targetZ);
                        return;
                    }
                    
                    const shouldStop = playerAtHilltop && this.hasClimbed && distToCenter <= SANDBAG_RADIUS + 0.15;
                    
                    if (!shouldStop) {
                        toPlayer.normalize();
                        
                        // Calculate new position
                        let newX = this.group.position.x + toPlayer.x * this.speed * dt;
                        let newZ = this.group.position.z + toPlayer.z * this.speed * dt;
                        
                        // If player is at hilltop, don't cross sandbag perimeter
                        if (playerAtHilltop) {
                            const newDistToCenter = Math.sqrt(newX * newX + newZ * newZ);
                            if (newDistToCenter < SANDBAG_RADIUS + 0.1) {
                                // Clamp to sandbag perimeter
                                const clampDist = SANDBAG_RADIUS + 0.1;
                                const angle = Math.atan2(newZ, newX);
                                newX = Math.cos(angle) * clampDist;
                                newZ = Math.sin(angle) * clampDist;
                            }
                        }
                        
                        this.group.position.x = newX;
                        this.group.position.z = newZ;
                    }
                    
                    // Calculate height on the slope based on distance from center
                    const newDist = Math.sqrt(this.group.position.x ** 2 + this.group.position.z ** 2);
                    
                    // Constants for slope calculation (matching terrain)
                    const HILLTOP_RADIUS_LOCAL = 6;
                    const SLOPE_OUTER_RADIUS_LOCAL = 120;
                    
                    let targetY;
                    if (this.hasClimbed && playerAtHilltop && newDist <= SANDBAG_RADIUS + 1) {
                        // On top of sandbags after climbing
                        targetY = (this.climbStartY || (HILLTOP_Y + 0.5)) + 1.8;
                    } else if (newDist <= HILLTOP_RADIUS_LOCAL) {
                        // On the hilltop platform - standing on top
                        targetY = HILLTOP_Y + 0.5;
                    } else if (newDist <= SANDBAG_RADIUS + 1) {
                        // Near sandbags - stay at hilltop level, don't sink
                        targetY = HILLTOP_Y + 0.5;
                    } else if (newDist >= SLOPE_OUTER_RADIUS_LOCAL) {
                        // Beyond the slope on flat ground
                        targetY = SLOPE_BOTTOM_Y;
                    } else {
                        // On the slope - calculate height using same curve as terrain
                        const t = (newDist - HILLTOP_RADIUS_LOCAL) / (SLOPE_OUTER_RADIUS_LOCAL - HILLTOP_RADIUS_LOCAL);
                        targetY = HILLTOP_Y - Math.pow(t, 0.7) * (HILLTOP_Y - SLOPE_BOTTOM_Y) + 0.5;
                    }
                    
                    this.group.position.y = targetY;
                    
                    // Animation - Minecraft style stiff movements (runners animate faster)
                    const animSpeed = this.isRunner ? 10 : (this.isGiant ? 3 : (this.isCrawler ? 6 : 5));
                    this.walkPhase += dt * animSpeed;
                    
                    if (this.isCrawler) {
                        // Crawling animation - arms reaching forward alternately
                        const armSwing = Math.sin(this.walkPhase) * 0.15;
                        this.leftArm.position.z = 0.5 + armSwing;
                        this.rightArm.position.z = 0.5 - armSwing;
                        this.leftArm.position.y = 0.15 + Math.abs(armSwing) * 0.1;
                        this.rightArm.position.y = 0.15 + Math.abs(-armSwing) * 0.1;
                    } else if (this.isAttacking) {
                        // Update attack animation progress if currently swinging
                        if (this.isDoingAttackSwing) {
                            this.attackAnimProgress += dt / this.ATTACK_ANIM_DURATION;
                            
                            if (this.attackAnimProgress >= 1) {
                                // Attack animation complete
                                this.isDoingAttackSwing = false;
                                this.attackAnimProgress = 0;
                            } else {
                                // Attack swing animation - synced with damage timing
                                // Use eased progress for smooth animation
                                const t = this.attackAnimProgress;
                                // Fast wind-up (0-0.3), powerful strike (0.3-0.6), recovery (0.6-1.0)
                                let armSwing, bodyLean, headLunge;
                                
                                if (t < 0.3) {
                                    // Wind-up phase - arms pull back
                                    const phase = t / 0.3;
                                    armSwing = -phase * 0.5; // Pull back
                                    bodyLean = phase * 0.1;
                                    headLunge = -phase * 0.1;
                                } else if (t < 0.6) {
                                    // Strike phase - arms swing forward powerfully
                                    const phase = (t - 0.3) / 0.3;
                                    armSwing = -0.5 + phase * 1.3; // Swing from back to forward
                                    bodyLean = 0.1 + phase * 0.2;
                                    headLunge = -0.1 + phase * 0.4;
                                } else {
                                    // Recovery phase - return to ready position
                                    const phase = (t - 0.6) / 0.4;
                                    armSwing = 0.8 - phase * 0.8; // Return to neutral
                                    bodyLean = 0.3 - phase * 0.2;
                                    headLunge = 0.3 - phase * 0.2;
                                }
                                
                                // Apply attack animation
                                if (this.leftArmPivot && this.rightArmPivot) {
                                    this.leftArmPivot.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2 - 0.5 + armSwing;
                                    this.rightArmPivot.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2 - 0.5 + armSwing;
                                    // Arms spread slightly during strike
                                    this.leftArmPivot.rotation.z = t < 0.6 ? -0.3 : -0.3 * (1 - (t - 0.6) / 0.4);
                                    this.rightArmPivot.rotation.z = t < 0.6 ? 0.3 : 0.3 * (1 - (t - 0.6) / 0.4);
                                }
                                if (this.leftLegPivot && this.rightLegPivot) {
                                    this.leftLegPivot.rotation.x = 0.15;
                                    this.rightLegPivot.rotation.x = -0.15;
                                }
                                if (this.head) {
                                    this.head.rotation.x = headLunge;
                                    this.head.rotation.z = 0;
                                }
                                this.group.rotation.x = bodyLean;
                            }
                        } else {
                            // Idle threatening pose when not actively swinging
                            // Arms extended forward, ready to strike
                            if (this.leftArmPivot && this.rightArmPivot) {
                                // Subtle menacing sway
                                const idleSway = Math.sin(this.walkPhase * 0.5) * 0.05;
                                this.leftArmPivot.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2 - 0.3 + idleSway;
                                this.rightArmPivot.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2 - 0.3 - idleSway;
                                this.leftArmPivot.rotation.z = -0.1;
                                this.rightArmPivot.rotation.z = 0.1;
                            }
                            if (this.leftLegPivot && this.rightLegPivot) {
                                this.leftLegPivot.rotation.x = 0.05;
                                this.rightLegPivot.rotation.x = -0.05;
                            }
                            if (this.head) {
                                // Head slightly tilted, watching player
                                this.head.rotation.x = 0.1;
                                this.head.rotation.z = Math.sin(this.walkPhase * 0.3) * 0.05;
                            }
                            this.group.rotation.x = 0.1; // Slight forward lean
                        }
                    } else {
                        // Minecraft zombie walking animation - leg pivots swing
                        const legSwing = Math.sin(this.walkPhase) * 0.5;
                        if (this.leftLegPivot && this.rightLegPivot) {
                            this.leftLegPivot.rotation.x = legSwing;
                            this.rightLegPivot.rotation.x = -legSwing;
                        }
                        // Arms bob slightly while extended
                        const armBob = Math.sin(this.walkPhase * 2) * 0.05;
                        if (this.leftArmPivot && this.rightArmPivot) {
                            this.leftArmPivot.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2 + armBob;
                            this.rightArmPivot.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2 - armBob;
                        }
                        // Head slight bob
                        if (this.head) {
                            this.head.rotation.z = Math.sin(this.walkPhase) * 0.05;
                        }
                        // Reset body rotation when not attacking
                        this.group.rotation.x = 0;
                    }
                    
                    // Face player (or target position)
                    this.group.lookAt(targetX, this.group.position.y, targetZ);
                    
                    // Check if zombie should be in attack mode (very close to player)
                    this.isAttacking = this.hasClimbed && distToCenter <= SANDBAG_RADIUS + 0.5;
                    
                    // Attack cooldown
                    if (this.attackCooldown > 0) {
                        this.attackCooldown -= dt;
                    }
                    
                    // Zombie groaning sounds (distance-based volume)
                    this.groanTimer -= dt;
                    if (this.groanTimer <= 0) {
                        playZombieGroan(this);
                        this.groanTimer = this.groanInterval + Math.random() * 2;
                    }
                }
                
                takeDamage(isHeadshot) {
                    if (this.dying) return { killed: false, headshot: false, helmetHit: false };
                    
                    // Trigger hit reaction (flinch) if not already reacting or knocked back
                    if (!this.isHitReacting && !this.isKnockedBack && !this.isClimbing) {
                        this.isHitReacting = true;
                        this.hitReactTimer = 0.25; // 250ms flinch
                        this.originalRotationX = this.group.rotation.x;
                        this.originalRotationZ = this.group.rotation.z;
                        
                        // Calculate hit direction (from player to zombie)
                        const zombiePos = this.group.position;
                        this.hitReactDirection.set(zombiePos.x, 0, zombiePos.z).normalize();
                    }
                    
                    // If headshot and has helmet, remove helmet instead of dealing full damage
                    if (isHeadshot && this.hasHelmet) {
                        this.removeHelmet();
                        // Helmet absorbs the headshot - deal only 1 damage
                        this.health -= 1;
                        
                        if (this.health <= 0) {
                            this.dying = true;
                            const deathTypes = ['backward', 'forward', 'left', 'right', 'spin'];
                            this.deathType = deathTypes[Math.floor(Math.random() * deathTypes.length)];
                            this.originalMaterials = [];
                            this.group.traverse((child) => {
                                if (child.isMesh && child.material) {
                                    if (Array.isArray(child.material)) {
                                        child.material = child.material.map(m => {
                                            const cloned = m.clone();
                                            cloned.transparent = true;
                                            this.originalMaterials.push(cloned);
                                            return cloned;
                                        });
                                    } else {
                                        child.material = child.material.clone();
                                        child.material.transparent = true;
                                        this.originalMaterials.push(child.material);
                                    }
                                }
                            });
                            return { killed: true, headshot: false, helmetHit: true };
                        }
                        return { killed: false, headshot: false, helmetHit: true };
                    }
                    
                    const damage = isHeadshot ? 3 : 1; // Headshot deals 3x damage instead of instant kill
                    this.health -= damage;
                    
                    if (this.health <= 0) {
                        this.dying = true;
                        // Randomly select death animation type
                        const deathTypes = ['backward', 'forward', 'left', 'right', 'spin'];
                        this.deathType = deathTypes[Math.floor(Math.random() * deathTypes.length)];
                        // Store original materials for fading
                        this.originalMaterials = [];
                        this.group.traverse((child) => {
                            if (child.isMesh && child.material) {
                                if (Array.isArray(child.material)) {
                                    child.material = child.material.map(m => {
                                        const cloned = m.clone();
                                        cloned.transparent = true;
                                        this.originalMaterials.push(cloned);
                                        return cloned;
                                    });
                                } else {
                                    child.material = child.material.clone();
                                    child.material.transparent = true;
                                    this.originalMaterials.push(child.material);
                                }
                            }
                        });
                        return { killed: true, headshot: isHeadshot, helmetHit: false };
                    }
                    return { killed: false, headshot: isHeadshot, helmetHit: false };
                }
                
                canAttackPlayer() {
                    // Must have climbed the sandbags first!
                    if (!this.hasClimbed) return false;
                    
                    const dist = Math.sqrt(this.group.position.x ** 2 + this.group.position.z ** 2);
                    // Attack when on top of sandbags after climbing - extremely close attack distance
                    return dist <= SANDBAG_RADIUS + 0.15 && !this.dying && this.attackCooldown <= 0;
                }
                
                isNearPlayer() {
                    const dist = Math.sqrt(this.group.position.x ** 2 + this.group.position.z ** 2);
                    return dist <= SANDBAG_RADIUS + 2 && !this.dying;
                }
                
                getWorldPosition() {
                    return this.group.position.clone();
                }
                
                attackPlayer() {
                    if (this.attackCooldown <= 0) {
                        this.attackCooldown = this.isGiant ? 2.0 : (this.isRunner ? 1.0 : 1.5); // Attack speed varies
                        // Trigger attack animation synced with damage
                        this.isDoingAttackSwing = true;
                        this.attackAnimProgress = 0;
                        return this.attackDamage;
                    }
                    return 0;
                }
                
                flashAttack() {
                    // Play zombie attack sound
                    playZombieAttack();
                    
                    // Make zombie flash red when attacking
                    const flashMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ color: 0xff0000 });
                    const originalMats = [];
                    
                    this.group.traverse((child) => {
                        if (child.isMesh && child.material) {
                            originalMats.push({ mesh: child, mat: child.material });
                            if (Array.isArray(child.material)) {
                                child.material = child.material.map(() => flashMat);
                            } else {
                                child.material = flashMat;
                            }
                        }
                    });
                    
                    // Restore after 200ms
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        originalMats.forEach(({ mesh, mat }) => {
                            mesh.material = mat;
                        });
                    }, 200);
                }
                
                // Execute ranged attack (Bone Thrower or Screamer)
                executeRangedAttack() {
                    const zombiePos = this.group.position.clone();
                    const targetPos = camera.position.clone();
                    
                    if (this.isBoneThrower) {
                        // Throw bone projectile from chest area
                        const throwPos = zombiePos.clone();
                        throwPos.y += 1.2;
                        
                        // Target at player camera height (y=15)
                        const boneTargetPos = targetPos.clone();
                        boneTargetPos.y = 15; // Camera height
                        
                        // Check accuracy - determines if this throw hits or narrowly misses
                        const accuracy = config.gameplay.boneThrowAccuracy || 0.7;
                        const isAccurateThrow = Math.random() < accuracy;
                        
                        if (!isAccurateThrow) {
                            // Near miss - bone flies close to player but doesn't hit
                            // This creates tension as bones whiz past the player
                            const missDeviation = 2.5 + Math.random() * 3; // 2.5-5.5 units off target
                            const missAngle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2; // Random direction around player
                            boneTargetPos.x += Math.cos(missAngle) * missDeviation;
                            boneTargetPos.z += Math.sin(missAngle) * missDeviation;
                            // Slight vertical deviation - can fly over or under
                            boneTargetPos.y += (Math.random() - 0.5) * 3;
                        }
                        
                        const bone = new BoneProjectile(throwPos, boneTargetPos);
                        boneProjectiles.push(bone);
                        
                        // Play throw sound
