            // ==================== BONE PROJECTILE CLASS ====================
            class BoneProjectile {
                constructor(startPos, targetPos) {
                    this.group = new THREE.Group();
                    this.group.position.copy(startPos);
                    
                    this.gravity = 15;
                    
                    // Calculate exact velocity to hit target considering gravity
                    const dx = targetPos.x - startPos.x;
                    const dz = targetPos.z - startPos.z;
                    const dy = targetPos.y - startPos.y;
                    
                    const distXZ = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dz * dz);
                    const speedXZ = 22; // Horizontal speed
                    
                    const t = distXZ / speedXZ; // Time to reach target
                    
                    this.velocity = new THREE.Vector3(
                        (dx / distXZ) * speedXZ,
                        (dy / t) + 0.5 * this.gravity * t,
                        (dz / distXZ) * speedXZ
                    );
                    this.alive = true;
                    this.lifetime = 0;
                    this.maxLifetime = 3;
                    this.damage = 12;
                    
                    // Create bone mesh - rib-like shape with zombie blood
                    const boneCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
                    boneCanvas.width = 32;
                    boneCanvas.height = 32;
                    const ctx = boneCanvas.getContext('2d');
                    // Bone base color
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#e8e0d0';
                    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 32, 32);
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#d0c8b8';
                    ctx.fillRect(4, 4, 12, 12);
                    ctx.fillRect(16, 16, 12, 12);
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#c0b8a0';
                    ctx.fillRect(0, 24, 32, 8);
                    
                    // Add zombie blood stains (green blood)
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#2a5a2a'; // Dark green blood
                    ctx.fillRect(6, 2, 8, 6);
                    ctx.fillRect(20, 10, 6, 8);
                    ctx.fillRect(2, 18, 10, 5);
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#3a7a3a'; // Lighter green blood
                    ctx.fillRect(8, 4, 4, 3);
                    ctx.fillRect(22, 12, 3, 4);
                    ctx.fillRect(4, 20, 6, 3);
                    // Blood drips
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#1a4a1a'; // Darker drips
                    ctx.fillRect(10, 7, 2, 4);
                    ctx.fillRect(24, 16, 2, 5);
                    ctx.fillRect(8, 22, 2, 6);
                    
                    const boneTex = new THREE.CanvasTexture(boneCanvas);
                    boneTex.magFilter = THREE.NearestFilter;
                    const boneMat = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ map: boneTex });
                    
                    // Rib bone shape - DOUBLED SIZE (2x larger)
                    const boneGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.16, 0.8, 0.3);
                    const bone = new THREE.Mesh(boneGeo, boneMat);
                    this.group.add(bone);
                    
                    // Add smaller bone tip - also doubled
                    const tipGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.12, 0.3, 0.2);
                    const tip = new THREE.Mesh(tipGeo, boneMat);
                    tip.position.y = 0.5;
                    this.group.add(tip);
                    
                    // Add blood drip mesh on bone
                    const dripMat = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ color: 0x2a5a2a });
                    const dripGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.06, 0.15, 0.06);
                    const drip1 = new THREE.Mesh(dripGeo, dripMat);
                    drip1.position.set(0.05, 0.2, 0.12);
                    this.group.add(drip1);
                    const drip2 = new THREE.Mesh(dripGeo, dripMat);
                    drip2.position.set(-0.04, -0.1, 0.14);
                    this.group.add(drip2);
                    
                    // Initial rotation to face direction of travel
                    this.group.lookAt(targetPos);
                    
                    scene.add(this.group);
                }
                
                update(dt) {
                    if (!this.alive) return;
                    
                    this.lifetime += dt;
                    if (this.lifetime > this.maxLifetime) {
                        this.alive = false;
                        return;
                    }
                    
                    // Apply gravity
                    this.velocity.y -= this.gravity * dt;
                    
                    // Move projectile
                    this.group.position.x += this.velocity.x * dt;
                    this.group.position.y += this.velocity.y * dt;
                    this.group.position.z += this.velocity.z * dt;
                    
                    // Spin the bone
                    this.group.rotation.x += dt * 12;
                    this.group.rotation.z += dt * 8;
                    
                    // Check collision with player (at camera position when idle)
                    if (playerMovementState === 'idle') {
                        const distToPlayer = this.group.position.distanceTo(camera.position);
                        if (distToPlayer < 2.5) {
                            this.alive = false;
                            return { hit: true, damage: this.damage };
                        }
                    } else {
                        // Player is moving - check distance to current player position
                        const distToPlayer = this.group.position.distanceTo(camera.position);
                        if (distToPlayer < 3.0) {
                            this.alive = false;
                            return { hit: true, damage: this.damage };
                        }
                    }
                    
                    // Check if hit ground
                    const dist = Math.sqrt(this.group.position.x ** 2 + this.group.position.z ** 2);
                    let groundY = SLOPE_BOTTOM_Y;
                    if (dist <= HILLTOP_RADIUS) {
                        groundY = HILLTOP_Y + 0.5;
                    } else if (dist < SLOPE_OUTER_RADIUS) {
                        const t = (dist - HILLTOP_RADIUS) / (SLOPE_OUTER_RADIUS - HILLTOP_RADIUS);
                        groundY = HILLTOP_Y - Math.pow(t, 0.7) * (HILLTOP_Y - SLOPE_BOTTOM_Y) + 0.5;
                    }
                    
                    if (this.group.position.y < groundY) {
                        this.alive = false;
                    }
                    
                    return { hit: false };
                }
                
                destroy() {
                    scene.remove(this.group);
                }
            }
            
            // ==================== SONIC WAVE EFFECT CLASS ====================
            class SonicWave {
                constructor(startPos, targetPos) {
                    this.group = new THREE.Group();
                    this.group.position.copy(startPos);
                    
                    // Face the player
                    this.group.lookAt(targetPos);
                    
                    this.alive = true;
                    this.lifetime = 0;
                    this.maxLifetime = 4; // Increased to ensure wave reaches player from max range
                    this.hasDealtDamage = false;
                    this.damage = 0; // Screamer deals no damage, only disrupts vision and boosts allies
                    this.targetPos = targetPos.clone();
                    this.startPos = startPos.clone();
                    
                    // Distance to travel
                    this.totalDist = startPos.distanceTo(targetPos);
                    this.speed = 35; // Faster to reach player reliably
                    this.currentDist = 0;
                    
                    // Create expanding ring waves - multiple for trail effect
                    this.rings = [];
                    const waveMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ 
                        color: 0x9966ff, 
                        transparent: true, 
                        opacity: 0.6,
                        side: THREE.DoubleSide
                    });
                    
                    for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
                        const ringGeo = new THREE.RingGeometry(0.3 + i * 0.2, 0.5 + i * 0.2, 16);
                        const ring = new THREE.Mesh(ringGeo, waveMat.clone());
                        ring.rotation.y = Math.PI / 2;
                        ring.position.z = -i * 0.5;
                        ring.userData.baseScale = 1 + i * 0.3;
                        ring.userData.delay = i * 0.1;
                        this.group.add(ring);
                        this.rings.push(ring);
                    }
                    
                    // Central distortion effect
                    const coreGeo = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.3, 8, 8);
                    const coreMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ 
                        color: 0xcc88ff, 
                        transparent: true, 
                        opacity: 0.8
                    });
                    this.core = new THREE.Mesh(coreGeo, coreMat);
                    this.group.add(this.core);
                    
                    scene.add(this.group);
                }
                
                update(dt) {
                    if (!this.alive) return;
                    
                    this.lifetime += dt;
                    if (this.lifetime > this.maxLifetime) {
                        this.alive = false;
                        return { hit: false };
                    }
                    
                    // Move toward target
                    const dir = new THREE.Vector3();
                    dir.subVectors(this.targetPos, this.startPos).normalize();
                    
                    this.currentDist += this.speed * dt;
                    const progress = Math.min(this.currentDist / this.totalDist, 1);
                    
                    this.group.position.lerpVectors(this.startPos, this.targetPos, progress);
                    
                    // Animate rings - expand and pulse
                    this.rings.forEach((ring, i) => {
                        const t = Math.max(0, this.lifetime - ring.userData.delay);
                        const scale = ring.userData.baseScale + Math.sin(t * 15) * 0.3 + t * 2;
                        ring.scale.setScalar(scale);
                        ring.material.opacity = Math.max(0, 0.6 - t * 0.4);
                        ring.rotation.x = t * 5;
                    });
                    
                    // Pulse core
                    const coreScale = 1 + Math.sin(this.lifetime * 20) * 0.3;
                    this.core.scale.setScalar(coreScale);
                    this.core.material.opacity = 0.8 - progress * 0.5;
                    
                    // Check collision with player
                    const distToPlayer = this.group.position.distanceTo(camera.position);
                    if (distToPlayer < 2.5 && !this.hasDealtDamage) {
                        this.hasDealtDamage = true;
                        return { hit: true, damage: this.damage, isScreamerAttack: true };
                    }
                    
                    return { hit: false }
                }
                
                destroy() {
                    scene.remove(this.group);
                }
            }
            
            function createFrozenMaterials() {
                // Create icy blue versions of zombie materials
                const frozenCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
                frozenCanvas.width = 32;
                frozenCanvas.height = 32;
                const ctx = frozenCanvas.getContext('2d');
                ctx.fillStyle = '#88ccff';
                ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 32, 32);
                ctx.fillStyle = '#aaddff';
                for (let i = 0; i < 20; i++) {
                    ctx.fillRect(Math.random() * 28, Math.random() * 28, 4, 4);
                }
                const frozenTex = new THREE.CanvasTexture(frozenCanvas);
                frozenTex.magFilter = THREE.NearestFilter;
                
                return {
                    body: new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ color: 0x88ccff }),
                    arm: new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ color: 0x99ddff }),
                    leg: new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ color: 0x7799cc }),
                    head: [
                        new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ color: 0x99ddff }),
                        new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ color: 0x99ddff }),
                        new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ color: 0xaaeeff }),
                        new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ color: 0xaaeeff }),
                        new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ color: 0x88ccff }),
                        new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ color: 0x99ddff })
                    ]
                };
            }
            
            function showCollectButton() {
                // Collection now triggered via crosshair lock-on + fire button
                // Button no longer needed
                collectBtn.style.display = 'none';
            }
            
            // Check if an airdrop is visible on screen (in camera view)
            function isAirdropVisible(airdrop) {
                if (!airdrop || airdrop.state !== 'landed') return false;
                
                const pos = airdrop.group.position.clone();
                pos.project(camera);
                
                // Check if within screen bounds (-1 to 1 in normalized device coordinates)
                return pos.x >= -1 && pos.x <= 1 && pos.y >= -1 && pos.y <= 1 && pos.z < 1;
            }
            
            // Get the closest visible landed airdrop to camera direction
            function getVisibleLandedAirdrop() {
                let closestAirdrop = null;
                let closestDot = -Infinity;
                
                // Get camera forward direction
                const cameraDir = new THREE.Vector3(0, 0, -1);
                cameraDir.applyQuaternion(camera.quaternion);
                cameraDir.y = 0; // Ignore vertical component
                cameraDir.normalize();
                
                for (const airdrop of activeAirdrops) {
                    if (airdrop.state !== 'landed') continue;
                    if (!isAirdropVisible(airdrop)) continue;
                    
                    // Calculate direction to airdrop
                    const toAirdrop = airdrop.group.position.clone().sub(camera.position);
                    toAirdrop.y = 0;
                    toAirdrop.normalize();
                    
                    // Dot product - higher means more aligned with camera direction
                    const dot = cameraDir.dot(toAirdrop);
                    
                    if (dot > closestDot) {
                        closestDot = dot;
                        closestAirdrop = airdrop;
                    }
                }
                
                return closestAirdrop;
            }
            
            // Check if crosshair is aimed at a landed airdrop (for lock-on effect)
            function isAimingAtAirdrop() {
                if (playerMovementState !== 'idle') return null;
                
                // Raycast from camera center
                const raycaster = new THREE.Raycaster();
                raycaster.setFromCamera(new THREE.Vector2(0, 0), camera);
                
                for (const airdrop of activeAirdrops) {
                    if (airdrop.state !== 'landed') continue;
                    
                    // Check crate hitbox
                    const crateBox = airdrop.getBoundingBox();
                    const hit = rayIntersectsBox(raycaster.ray, crateBox);
                    
                    if (hit) {
                        return airdrop;
                    }
                }
                
                return null;
            }
            
            // Update lock-on target on 3D model
            let currentLockedAirdrop = null;
            
            function updateLockOnTarget() {
                // Lock-on effect requires PRECISE crosshair aiming - no tolerance
                if (playerMovementState !== 'idle') {
                    // Hide all lock-on effects when player is moving
                    activeAirdrops.forEach(a => a.showLockOn(false));
                    currentLockedAirdrop = null;
                    crosshair.classList.remove('supply-locked');
                    return;
                }
                
                // Use precise raycasting - must aim exactly at the crate
                const aimedAirdrop = isAimingAtAirdrop();
                
                // Hide lock-on on all airdrops first
                activeAirdrops.forEach(a => a.showLockOn(false));
                
                if (aimedAirdrop && (gameState === 'playing' || isWaveTransition)) {
                    currentLockedAirdrop = aimedAirdrop;
                    // Show lock-on effect on the aimed airdrop's 3D model
                    aimedAirdrop.showLockOn(true);
                    // Show lock-on crosshair effect - large green frame
                    crosshair.classList.add('supply-locked');
                } else {
                    currentLockedAirdrop = null;
                    // Remove lock-on crosshair effect
                    crosshair.classList.remove('supply-locked');
                }
            }
            
            function hideCollectButton() {
                collectBtn.style.display = 'none';
            }
            
            function showItemNotification(text) {
                itemNotification.textContent = text;
                itemNotification.classList.remove('show');
                void itemNotification.offsetWidth;
                itemNotification.classList.add('show');
            }
            
            // Screen shake for airstrike
            let screenShakeTimer = 0;
            let screenShakeIntensity = 0;
            
            function startScreenShake(duration, intensity) {
                screenShakeTimer = duration;
                screenShakeIntensity = intensity;
            }
            
            function updateScreenShake(dt) {
                if (screenShakeTimer > 0) {
                    screenShakeTimer -= dt;
                    const shakeX = (Math.random() - 0.5) * screenShakeIntensity * (screenShakeTimer / 0.5);
                    const shakeY = (Math.random() - 0.5) * screenShakeIntensity * (screenShakeTimer / 0.5);
                    cameraShakeX = shakeX * 0.01;
                    cameraShakeY = shakeY * 0.01;
                } else if (playerMovementState === 'idle') {
                    // Only reset shake if not running
                    if (screenShakeIntensity > 0) {
                        cameraShakeX = 0;
                        cameraShakeY = 0;
                        screenShakeIntensity = 0;
                    }
                }
            }
            
            // Apply frozen visual effect to zombie
            function applyFrozenEffect(zombie, frozen) {
                if (!frozenZombieMats) return;
                
                if (frozen) {
                    // Store original materials and apply frozen look
                    zombie.frozenOriginalMats = [];
                    zombie.group.traverse((child) => {
                        if (child.isMesh && child.material) {
                            zombie.frozenOriginalMats.push({ mesh: child, mat: child.material });
                            if (Array.isArray(child.material)) {
                                child.material = frozenZombieMats.head;
                            } else if (child === zombie.leftArm || child === zombie.rightArm) {
                                child.material = frozenZombieMats.arm;
                            } else if (child === zombie.leftLeg || child === zombie.rightLeg) {
                                child.material = frozenZombieMats.leg;
                            } else {
                                child.material = frozenZombieMats.body;
                            }
                        }
                    });
                } else {
                    // Restore original materials
                    if (zombie.frozenOriginalMats) {
                        zombie.frozenOriginalMats.forEach(({ mesh, mat }) => {
                            mesh.material = mat;
                        });
                        zombie.frozenOriginalMats = null;
                    }
                }
            }
            
            function updateInventoryUI() {
                itemInventoryDiv.innerHTML = '';
                
                let hasItems = false;
                Object.entries(playerInventory).forEach(([itemId, count]) => {
                    if (count > 0) {
                        hasItems = true;
                        const itemType = ITEM_TYPES[itemId];
                        const slot = document.createElement('div');
                        slot.className = 'item-slot';
                        slot.innerHTML = `
                            <span class="item-key">${itemType.key}</span>
                            <span class="item-icon">${itemType.icon}</span>
                            <span class="item-count">×${count}</span>
                        `;
                        slot.title = `${itemType.name}: ${itemType.description} (Press ${itemType.key})`;
                        slot.addEventListener('click', () => useItem(itemId));
                        slot.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => {
                            e.preventDefault();
                            useItem(itemId);
                        });
                        itemInventoryDiv.appendChild(slot);
                    }
                });
                
                // Hide instructions when player has items
                if (hasItems) {
                    instructions.style.display = 'none';
                } else {
                    instructions.style.display = 'block';
                }
            }
            
            function useItem(itemId) {
                if (playerInventory[itemId] <= 0) return;
                if (gameState !== 'playing' && !isWaveTransition) return;
                
                const itemType = ITEM_TYPES[itemId];
                if (itemType.use()) {
                    playerInventory[itemId]--;
                    updateInventoryUI();
                }
            }
            
            // Keyboard shortcuts for items
            document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
                if (gameState !== 'playing' && !isWaveTransition) return;
                
                const keyMap = { '1': 'medkit', '2': 'airstrike', '3': 'overdrive', '4': 'shield', '5': 'freeze' };
                if (keyMap[e.key]) {
                    useItem(keyMap[e.key]);
                }
            });
            
            // Auto-fire toggle UI
            const autoFireToggle = document.getElementById('auto-fire-toggle');
            const autoFireSwitch = autoFireToggle.querySelector('.toggle-switch');
            
            function updateAutoFireUI() {
                if (autoFireEnabled) {
                    autoFireSwitch.classList.add('on');
                } else {
                    autoFireSwitch.classList.remove('on');
                }
            }
            
            autoFireToggle.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                e.stopPropagation();
                autoFireEnabled = !autoFireEnabled;
                updateAutoFireUI();
            });
            
            autoFireToggle.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => {
                e.preventDefault();
                e.stopPropagation();
                autoFireEnabled = !autoFireEnabled;
                updateAutoFireUI();
            });
            
            // Determine what item to give (single item based on weighted probability)
            function getAirdropItems(waveNum) {
                // Get drop rates from config
                const dropRates = config.airdrop.itemDropRates || {
                    medkit: 35,
                    airstrike: 25,
                    overdrive: 15,
                    shield: 15,
                    freeze: 10
                };
                
                // Filter available items based on wave (unlock system)
                const availableItems = [];
                const weights = [];
                
                // Medkit always available
                availableItems.push('medkit');
                weights.push(dropRates.medkit || 35);
                
                // Airstrike unlocks at wave 2
                if (waveNum >= 2) {
                    availableItems.push('airstrike');
                    weights.push(dropRates.airstrike || 25);
                }
                
                // Overdrive unlocks at wave 3
                if (waveNum >= 3) {
                    availableItems.push('overdrive');
                    weights.push(dropRates.overdrive || 15);
                }
                
                // Shield unlocks at wave 4
                if (waveNum >= 4) {
                    availableItems.push('shield');
                    weights.push(dropRates.shield || 15);
                }
                
                // Freeze unlocks at wave 5
                if (waveNum >= 5) {
                    availableItems.push('freeze');
                    weights.push(dropRates.freeze || 10);
                }
                
                // Weighted random selection - pick ONE item
                const totalWeight = weights.reduce((sum, w) => sum + w, 0);
                let random = Math.random() * totalWeight;
                
                for (let i = 0; i < availableItems.length; i++) {
                    random -= weights[i];
                    if (random <= 0) {
                        return [availableItems[i]];
                    }
                }
                
                // Fallback to medkit
                return ['medkit'];
            }
            
            function giveItems(items) {
                items.forEach(itemId => {
                    playerInventory[itemId]++;
                });
                updateInventoryUI();
                
                // Show what was received
                const itemNames = items.map(id => ITEM_TYPES[id].icon + ' ' + ITEM_TYPES[id].name).join(', ');
                showItemNotification('RECEIVED: ' + itemNames);
            }
            
            // Update item effects
            function updateItemEffects(dt) {
                // Overdrive
                if (overdriveActive) {
                    overdriveTimer -= dt;
                    // Update timer display
                    overdriveTimerEl.querySelector('.effect-time').textContent = Math.ceil(overdriveTimer) + 's';
                    if (overdriveTimer <= 0) {
                        overdriveActive = false;
                        overdriveOverlay.classList.remove('active');
                        overdriveTimerEl.classList.remove('active');
                        crosshair.classList.remove('overdrive');
                    }
                }
                
                // Shield
                if (shieldActive) {
                    shieldTimer -= dt;
                    // Update timer display
                    shieldTimerEl.querySelector('.effect-time').textContent = Math.ceil(shieldTimer) + 's';
                    if (shieldTimer <= 0) {
                        shieldActive = false;
                        shieldOverlay.classList.remove('active');
                        shieldTimerEl.classList.remove('active');
                    }
                }
                
                // Freeze
                if (freezeActive) {
                    freezeTimer -= dt;
                    // Update timer display
                    freezeTimerEl.querySelector('.effect-time').textContent = Math.ceil(freezeTimer) + 's';
                    if (freezeTimer <= 0) {
                        freezeActive = false;
                        freezeOverlay.classList.remove('active');
                        freezeTimerEl.classList.remove('active');
                        // Restore zombie speeds and appearance
                        zombies.forEach(zombie => {
                            if (zombie.originalSpeed) {
                                zombie.speed = zombie.originalSpeed;
                                zombie.originalSpeed = null;
                                // Restore original appearance
                                applyFrozenEffect(zombie, false);
                            }
                        });
                        // Restore bat speeds
                        zombieBats.forEach(bat => {
                            if (bat.originalSpeed) {
                                bat.speed = bat.originalSpeed;
                                bat.originalSpeed = null;
                            }
                        });
                        // Restore dog speeds
                        zombieDogs.forEach(dog => {
                            if (dog.originalSpeed) {
                                dog.speed = dog.originalSpeed;
                                dog.originalSpeed = null;
                            }
                        });
                    }
                }
                
                // Screamer speed boost (when screamer attack hits player, zombies get faster)
                if (screamerBoostActive) {
                    screamerBoostTimer -= dt;
                    if (screamerBoostTimer <= 0) {
                        screamerBoostActive = false;
                        // Restore zombie speeds
                        const speedBoost = config.gameplay.screamerSpeedBoost || 0.5;
                        zombies.forEach(zombie => {
                            if (zombie.screamerBoosted && !zombie.dying) {
                                zombie.speed = zombie.speed / (1 + speedBoost);
                                zombie.screamerBoosted = false;
                            }
                        });
                        zombieBats.forEach(bat => {
                            if (bat.screamerBoosted && !bat.dying) {
                                bat.speed = bat.speed / (1 + speedBoost);
                                bat.screamerBoosted = false;
                            }
                        });
                        zombieDogs.forEach(dog => {
                            if (dog.screamerBoosted && !dog.dying) {
                                dog.speed = dog.speed / (1 + speedBoost);
                                dog.screamerBoosted = false;
                            }
                        });
                    }
                }
            }
            
            // Activate screamer speed boost - boosts all zombie movement speed
            function activateScreamerSpeedBoost() {
                const speedBoost = config.gameplay.screamerSpeedBoost || 0.5;
                
                // If already active, just reset timer (don't stack)
                if (!screamerBoostActive) {
                    // Apply speed boost to all zombies
                    zombies.forEach(zombie => {
                        if (zombie.alive && !zombie.dying && !zombie.screamerBoosted) {
                            zombie.speed *= (1 + speedBoost);
                            zombie.screamerBoosted = true;
                        }
                    });
                    zombieBats.forEach(bat => {
                        if (bat.alive && !bat.dying && !bat.screamerBoosted) {
                            bat.speed *= (1 + speedBoost);
                            bat.screamerBoosted = true;
                        }
                    });
                    zombieDogs.forEach(dog => {
                        if (dog.alive && !dog.dying && !dog.screamerBoosted) {
                            dog.speed *= (1 + speedBoost);
                            dog.screamerBoosted = true;
                        }
                    });
                }
                
                screamerBoostActive = true;
                screamerBoostTimer = SCREAMER_BOOST_DURATION;
            }
            
            // Airdrop collection state
            let isCollecting = false;
            let collectionProgress = 0;
            const COLLECTION_TIME = 3; // 3 seconds to collect
            
            // Player movement states for airdrop collection
            let playerMovementState = 'idle'; // idle, running_to_airdrop, at_airdrop, running_back
            let playerRunProgress = 0;
            const PLAYER_RUN_SPEED = 0.45; // How fast the camera moves (progress per second) - slower for tense running feel
            let runStartPos = null;
            let runTargetPos = null;
            let runStartYaw = 0;
            let runTargetYaw = 0;
            let runStartPitch = 0;
            let runTargetPitch = 0;
            let currentCollectingAirdrop = null; // Reference to the airdrop being collected
            let runningTime = 0; // Track time for footstep sounds
            let cameraRotationProgress = 0; // For smooth camera rotation when running back
            let originalFacingYaw = 0; // Store original yaw before running to airdrop
            let originalFacingPitch = 0; // Store original pitch before running to airdrop
            
            // Stationary turret on hilltop (visible when player runs to airdrop)
            const stationaryTurretGroup = new THREE.Group();
            
            function createStationaryTurret() {
                // Clone the turret appearance for stationary version on hilltop
                const gunMetalMat2 = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ map: createMetalTexture('#3a3a3a') });
                const gunDarkMat2 = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ map: createMetalTexture('#1a1a1a') });
                const gunBrassMat2 = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ map: createMetalTexture('#8b7355') });
                
                // Main gun body (receiver)
                const receiverGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.35, 0.25, 0.8);
                const receiver = new THREE.Mesh(receiverGeo, gunMetalMat2);
                receiver.position.set(0, 0.3, 0);
                stationaryTurretGroup.add(receiver);
                
                // Barrel group
                const barrelGroup2 = new THREE.Group();
                barrelGroup2.position.set(0, 0.3, -1);
                const barrelLength = 1.2;
                for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
                    const angle = (i / 6) * Math.PI * 2;
                    const barrelGeo = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.025, 0.025, barrelLength, 8);
                    const barrel = new THREE.Mesh(barrelGeo, gunDarkMat2);
                    barrel.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
                    barrel.position.set(Math.cos(angle) * 0.06, Math.sin(angle) * 0.06, -barrelLength / 2 + 0.6);
                    barrelGroup2.add(barrel);
                }
                const mainBarrelGeo = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.04, 0.04, barrelLength + 0.2, 8);
                const mainBarrel = new THREE.Mesh(mainBarrelGeo, gunMetalMat2);
                mainBarrel.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
                mainBarrel.position.set(0, 0, -barrelLength / 2 + 0.5);
                barrelGroup2.add(mainBarrel);
                
                const shroudGeo = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.12, 0.1, 0.6, 12);
                const shroud = new THREE.Mesh(shroudGeo, gunMetalMat2);
                shroud.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
                shroud.position.set(0, 0, 0.6);
                barrelGroup2.add(shroud);
                stationaryTurretGroup.add(barrelGroup2);
                
                // Muzzle brake
                const muzzleGeo = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.08, 0.12, 0.15, 8);
                const muzzle2 = new THREE.Mesh(muzzleGeo, gunDarkMat2);
                muzzle2.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
                muzzle2.position.set(0, 0.3, -1.15);
                stationaryTurretGroup.add(muzzle2);
                
                // Ammo box
                const ammoBoxGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.3, 0.25, 0.2);
                const ammoBox2 = new THREE.Mesh(ammoBoxGeo, gunBrassMat2);
                ammoBox2.position.set(0.25, 0.15, 0.2);
                stationaryTurretGroup.add(ammoBox2);
                
                // Tripod stand
                const tripodMat = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ color: 0x333333 });
                const legGeo = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.03, 0.03, 0.8, 6);
                for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
                    const angle = (i / 3) * Math.PI * 2 + Math.PI / 6;
                    const leg = new THREE.Mesh(legGeo, tripodMat);
                    leg.position.set(Math.cos(angle) * 0.3, -0.2, Math.sin(angle) * 0.3);
                    leg.rotation.x = 0.3;
                    leg.rotation.z = -Math.cos(angle) * 0.3;
                    stationaryTurretGroup.add(leg);
                }
                
                // Position on hilltop
                stationaryTurretGroup.position.set(0, 11, 0);
                stationaryTurretGroup.visible = false;
                scene.add(stationaryTurretGroup);
            }
            
            createStationaryTurret();
            
            collectBtn.addEventListener('click', startCollection);
            collectBtn.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => {
                e.preventDefault();
                startCollection();
            });
            
            function startCollection() {
                // Must be precisely aiming at the airdrop - no tolerance
                const targetAirdrop = isAimingAtAirdrop();
                if (!targetAirdrop || targetAirdrop.state !== 'landed') return;
                if (playerMovementState !== 'idle') return;
                
                // Store reference to current airdrop being collected
                currentCollectingAirdrop = targetAirdrop;
                
                // Directly start running to airdrop (no preparation phase)
                playerMovementState = 'running_to_airdrop';
                
                playerRunProgress = 0;
                
                // Hide collect button
                hideCollectButton();
                
                targetAirdrop.state = 'collecting';
                
                // Store starting position and angles
                runStartPos = camera.position.clone();
                runStartYaw = cameraYaw;
                runStartPitch = cameraPitch;
                
                // Store original facing direction to restore after collection
                originalFacingYaw = cameraYaw;
                originalFacingPitch = cameraPitch;
                
                // Calculate target position near airdrop
                const airdropPos = targetAirdrop.group.position.clone();
                const dirToHilltop = new THREE.Vector3(-airdropPos.x, 0, -airdropPos.z).normalize();
                runTargetPos = airdropPos.clone().add(dirToHilltop.multiplyScalar(2));
                runTargetPos.y = airdropPos.y + 1.5;
                
                // Calculate yaw to face the airdrop
                runTargetYaw = Math.atan2(-(airdropPos.x - runTargetPos.x), -(airdropPos.z - runTargetPos.z));
                
                // Show stationary turret on hilltop
                stationaryTurretGroup.visible = true;
                stationaryTurretGroup.rotation.y = cameraYaw;
                
                // Hide camera-attached turret
                turretGroup.visible = false;
                
                // Hide crosshair
                crosshair.style.display = 'none';
            }
            
            // Camera shake for running effect
            let cameraShakeX = 0;
            let cameraShakeY = 0;
            
            function updatePlayerMovement(dt) {
                if (playerMovementState === 'idle') {
                    cameraShakeX = 0;
                    cameraShakeY = 0;
                    return;
                }
                
                if (playerMovementState === 'running_to_airdrop') {
                    playerRunProgress += dt * PLAYER_RUN_SPEED;
                    runningTime += dt;
                    
                    // Play footstep sounds at regular intervals
                    if (runningTime - lastFootstepTime >= FOOTSTEP_INTERVAL) {
                        playFootstep();
                        lastFootstepTime = runningTime;
                    }
                    
                    // Ease in-out interpolation
                    const t = Math.min(playerRunProgress, 1);
                    const ease = t < 0.5 ? 2 * t * t : 1 - Math.pow(-2 * t + 2, 2) / 2;
                    
                    // Interpolate camera position
                    camera.position.lerpVectors(runStartPos, runTargetPos, ease);
                    
                    // Camera faces direction of movement (towards airdrop)
                    if (currentCollectingAirdrop) {
                        const dx = runTargetPos.x - runStartPos.x;
                        const dz = runTargetPos.z - runStartPos.z;
                        cameraYaw = Math.atan2(-dx, -dz);
                        cameraPitch = -0.15; // Slightly looking down while running
                    }
                    
                    // Subtle running camera shake (very small, tense feeling)
                    const runTime = playerRunProgress * 20; // Speed of shake
                    cameraShakeX = Math.sin(runTime) * 0.008;
                    cameraShakeY = Math.abs(Math.sin(runTime * 2)) * 0.012;
                    
                    // Arrived at airdrop
                    if (playerRunProgress >= 1) {
                        playerMovementState = 'at_airdrop';
                        collectionProgress = 0;
                        isCollecting = true;
                        collectProgress.style.display = 'block';
                        progressBar.style.stroke = '#27ae60'; // Green for collection
                        cameraShakeX = 0;
                        cameraShakeY = 0;
                        
                        // Start looping rummage sound during collection
                        startRummageSound();
                        
                        // Face the airdrop crate
                        if (currentCollectingAirdrop) {
                            const airdropPos = currentCollectingAirdrop.group.position;
                            cameraYaw = Math.atan2(airdropPos.x - camera.position.x, airdropPos.z - camera.position.z);
                            cameraPitch = -0.3; // Look down at crate
                        }
                    }
                }
                else if (playerMovementState === 'at_airdrop') {
                    // Collecting at airdrop - camera faces the crate, no shake
                    cameraShakeX = 0;
                    cameraShakeY = 0;
                    
                    // Keep camera facing the airdrop crate
                    if (currentCollectingAirdrop) {
                        const airdropPos = currentCollectingAirdrop.group.position;
                        const dx = airdropPos.x - camera.position.x;
                        const dz = airdropPos.z - camera.position.z;
                        cameraYaw = Math.atan2(-dx, -dz);
                        cameraPitch = -0.3; // Look down at crate
                    }
                    
                    collectionProgress += dt;
                    const progress = collectionProgress / COLLECTION_TIME;
                    
                    // Update circular progress bar
                    const offset = 377 * (1 - progress);
                    progressBar.style.strokeDashoffset = offset;
                    progressText.textContent = Math.floor(progress * 100) + '%';
                    
                    if (collectionProgress >= COLLECTION_TIME) {
                        // Collection complete - start running back
                        completeCollectionAndRunBack();
                    }
                }
                else if (playerMovementState === 'running_back') {
                    playerRunProgress += dt * PLAYER_RUN_SPEED;
                    runningTime += dt;
                    
                    // Play footstep sounds at regular intervals
                    if (runningTime - lastFootstepTime >= FOOTSTEP_INTERVAL) {
                        playFootstep();
                        lastFootstepTime = runningTime;
                    }
                    
                    // Ease in-out interpolation
                    const t = Math.min(playerRunProgress, 1);
                    const ease = t < 0.5 ? 2 * t * t : 1 - Math.pow(-2 * t + 2, 2) / 2;
                    
                    // Interpolate camera position back to hilltop
                    camera.position.lerpVectors(runStartPos, runTargetPos, ease);
                    
                    // Camera faces direction of movement (towards hilltop) - no rotation during running
                    const dx = runTargetPos.x - runStartPos.x;
                    const dz = runTargetPos.z - runStartPos.z;
                    cameraYaw = Math.atan2(-dx, -dz);
                    cameraPitch = -0.15; // Slightly looking down while running
                    
                    // Subtle running camera shake
                    const runTime = playerRunProgress * 20;
                    cameraShakeX = Math.sin(runTime) * 0.008;
                    cameraShakeY = Math.abs(Math.sin(runTime * 2)) * 0.012;
                    
                    // Arrived back at hilltop - start turning around
                    if (playerRunProgress >= 1) {
                        playerMovementState = 'turning_around';
                        cameraRotationProgress = 0;
                        
                        // Store current yaw as start for turning
                        runStartYaw = cameraYaw;
                        runStartPitch = cameraPitch;
                        
                        cameraShakeX = 0;
                        cameraShakeY = 0;
                        runningTime = 0;
                        lastFootstepTime = 0;
                    }
                }
                else if (playerMovementState === 'turning_around') {
                    // Smoothly turn to face original direction after arriving at hilltop
                    cameraRotationProgress += dt * 2.5; // Turn speed
                    const rotEase = 1 - Math.pow(1 - Math.min(cameraRotationProgress, 1), 3); // Ease out cubic
                    
                    // Interpolate yaw to original facing direction
                    let yawDiff = originalFacingYaw - runStartYaw;
                    // Normalize the difference to [-PI, PI] for shortest rotation
                    while (yawDiff > Math.PI) yawDiff -= Math.PI * 2;
                    while (yawDiff < -Math.PI) yawDiff += Math.PI * 2;
                    cameraYaw = runStartYaw + yawDiff * rotEase;
                    
                    // Interpolate pitch
                    cameraPitch = runStartPitch + (originalFacingPitch - runStartPitch) * rotEase;
                    
                    // Finished turning
                    if (cameraRotationProgress >= 1) {
                        playerMovementState = 'idle';
                        
                        // Hide stationary turret, show camera turret
                        stationaryTurretGroup.visible = false;
                        turretGroup.visible = true;
                        
                        // Show crosshair again
                        crosshair.style.display = 'block';
                        
                        // Ensure final yaw/pitch are exactly the original values
                        cameraYaw = originalFacingYaw;
                        cameraPitch = originalFacingPitch;
                    }
                }
            }
            
            function updateCollection(dt) {
                // Collection is now handled in updatePlayerMovement
            }
            
            function completeCollectionAndRunBack() {
                isCollecting = false;
                collectProgress.style.display = 'none';

                // Stop rummage sound and play completion sound
                stopRummageSound();

                    // Destroy and remove from array
                    currentCollectingAirdrop.destroy();

                    if (idx > -1) activeAirdrops.splice(idx, 1);
                    currentCollectingAirdrop = null;
                }
                
                // Start running back to hilltop
                playerMovementState = 'running_back';
                playerRunProgress = 0;
                cameraRotationProgress = 0; // Reset rotation progress for smooth turn
                
                // Current position becomes start
                runStartPos = camera.position.clone();
                runStartYaw = cameraYaw;
                runStartPitch = cameraPitch;
                
                // Target is back at hilltop gun position
                runTargetPos = new THREE.Vector3(0, 15, 0);
                // Target yaw is the original direction player was facing before collection
                runTargetYaw = originalFacingYaw;
                runTargetPitch = originalFacingPitch;
            }
            
            function completeCollection() {
                // Deprecated - now using completeCollectionAndRunBack
            }
            
            // Plane flyover effect - creates a shadow that sweeps across the ground
            let planeFlyoverActive = false;
            let planeShadow = null;
            let planeFlyoverProgress = 0;
            const PLANE_FLYOVER_DURATION = 8.0; // Seconds for shadow to cross the map
            let planeFlyoverStartAngle = 0;
            let planeFlyoverTargetX = 0;
            let planeFlyoverTargetZ = 0;
            let planeHasDropped = false;
            let pendingAirdrop = null; // Store airdrop to spawn when plane passes
            
            function startPlaneFlyover(targetX, targetZ) {
                // Play plane sound
                playPlaneFlyoverSound();
                
                // Create plane shadow - airplane silhouette shape
                if (planeShadow) {
                    scene.remove(planeShadow);
                }
                
                // Create airplane-shaped shadow using Shape
                const planeShape = new THREE.Shape();
                // Fuselage - elongated body
                planeShape.moveTo(0, -8);  // Nose
                planeShape.lineTo(1.2, -6);
                planeShape.lineTo(1.5, -2);
                // Right wing
                planeShape.lineTo(8, -1);
                planeShape.lineTo(8, 1);
                planeShape.lineTo(1.5, 0.5);
                // Tail section
                planeShape.lineTo(1.5, 5);
                // Right tail wing
                planeShape.lineTo(4, 6);
                planeShape.lineTo(4, 7);
                planeShape.lineTo(1.2, 6.5);
                // Tail top
                planeShape.lineTo(1, 8);
                planeShape.lineTo(-1, 8);
                // Left tail wing
                planeShape.lineTo(-1.2, 6.5);
                planeShape.lineTo(-4, 7);
                planeShape.lineTo(-4, 6);
                planeShape.lineTo(-1.5, 5);
                // Back to left wing
                planeShape.lineTo(-1.5, 0.5);
                planeShape.lineTo(-8, 1);
                planeShape.lineTo(-8, -1);
                planeShape.lineTo(-1.5, -2);
                planeShape.lineTo(-1.2, -6);
                planeShape.lineTo(0, -8);  // Back to nose
                
                const shadowGeo = new THREE.ShapeGeometry(planeShape);
                const shadowMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
                    color: 0x000000,
                    transparent: true,
                    opacity: 0.35,
                    side: THREE.DoubleSide
                });
                planeShadow = new THREE.Mesh(shadowGeo, shadowMat);
                planeShadow.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2; // Lay flat on ground
                
                // Calculate flyover direction - plane flies toward the airdrop drop point
                // Start from one edge of the map, fly over toward the airdrop location
                planeFlyoverStartAngle = Math.atan2(targetZ, targetX) + Math.PI; // Opposite direction
                
                // Store target position for airdrop spawn timing
                planeFlyoverTargetX = targetX;
                planeFlyoverTargetZ = targetZ;
                planeHasDropped = false; // Track if airdrop has been spawned
                
                // Start position - far edge of map
                const startDist = 200;
                const startX = Math.cos(planeFlyoverStartAngle) * startDist;
                const startZ = Math.sin(planeFlyoverStartAngle) * startDist;
                planeShadow.position.set(startX, SLOPE_BOTTOM_Y + 0.5, startZ);
                
                // Rotate shadow to align with flight direction (nose pointing forward)
                const dx = -Math.cos(planeFlyoverStartAngle);
                const dz = -Math.sin(planeFlyoverStartAngle);
                planeShadow.rotation.z = Math.atan2(dx, dz);
                
                scene.add(planeShadow);
                
                planeFlyoverActive = true;
                planeFlyoverProgress = 0;
            }
            
            function updatePlaneFlyover(dt) {
                if (!planeFlyoverActive || !planeShadow) return;
                
                planeFlyoverProgress += dt / PLANE_FLYOVER_DURATION;
                
                if (planeFlyoverProgress >= 1) {
                    // Flyover complete - remove shadow
                    scene.remove(planeShadow);
                    planeShadow = null;
                    planeFlyoverActive = false;
                    return;
                }
                
                // Ease in-out movement
                const t = planeFlyoverProgress;
                const ease = t < 0.5 ? 2 * t * t : 1 - Math.pow(-2 * t + 2, 2) / 2;
                
                // Move shadow across the map
                const startDist = 200;
                const endDist = -200; // Fly completely across
                const currentDist = startDist + (endDist - startDist) * ease;
                
                const posX = Math.cos(planeFlyoverStartAngle) * currentDist;
                const posZ = Math.sin(planeFlyoverStartAngle) * currentDist;
                
                // Calculate Y based on terrain height at current position
                const dist = Math.sqrt(posX ** 2 + posZ ** 2);
                let groundY;
                if (dist <= HILLTOP_RADIUS) {
                    groundY = HILLTOP_Y + 0.5;
                } else if (dist >= SLOPE_OUTER_RADIUS) {
                    groundY = SLOPE_BOTTOM_Y + 0.5;
                } else {
                    const terrainT = (dist - HILLTOP_RADIUS) / (SLOPE_OUTER_RADIUS - HILLTOP_RADIUS);
                    groundY = HILLTOP_Y - Math.pow(terrainT, 0.7) * (HILLTOP_Y - SLOPE_BOTTOM_Y) + 0.5;
                }
                
                planeShadow.position.set(posX, groundY, posZ);
                
                // Shadow gets more intense in the middle of the flyover (plane passing overhead)
                const distFromCenter = Math.abs(currentDist);
                const centerIntensity = 1 - Math.min(distFromCenter / 100, 1);
                planeShadow.material.opacity = 0.2 + centerIntensity * 0.4;
                
                // Scale shadow - larger when "overhead" (center of flight)
                const shadowScale = 0.8 + centerIntensity * 0.4;
                planeShadow.scale.set(shadowScale, shadowScale, 1);
                
                // Check if plane shadow has reached the drop zone - spawn airdrop!
                if (!planeHasDropped && pendingAirdrop) {
                    const distToTarget = Math.sqrt(
                        (posX - planeFlyoverTargetX) ** 2 + 
                        (posZ - planeFlyoverTargetZ) ** 2
                    );
                    
                    // When plane passes within 15 units of target, drop the crate
                    if (distToTarget < 15) {
                        planeHasDropped = true;
                        // Actually add the airdrop to the scene and active list
                        activeAirdrops.push(pendingAirdrop);
                        scene.add(pendingAirdrop.group);
                        if (pendingAirdrop.shadow) {
                            scene.add(pendingAirdrop.shadow);
                        }
                        pendingAirdrop = null;
                        airdropIndicator.style.display = 'block';
                        // Hide indicator after a few seconds
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            airdropIndicator.style.display = 'none';
                        }, 3000);
                    }
                }
            }
            
            function spawnAirdrop() {
                // Create airdrop but DON'T add to scene yet
                const newAirdrop = new Airdrop();
                // Remove from scene initially - will be added when plane passes
                scene.remove(newAirdrop.group);
                if (newAirdrop.shadow) {
                    scene.remove(newAirdrop.shadow);
                }
                
                // Store as pending - will be spawned when plane shadow passes over
                pendingAirdrop = newAirdrop;
                
                // Start plane flyover effect toward the airdrop location
                // Plane appears first, then drops the crate when passing over target
                startPlaneFlyover(newAirdrop.targetX, newAirdrop.targetZ);
            }

            // ==================== GAME STATE ====================

            // ==================== UI ELEMENTS ====================

            async function showLeaderboardPopup() {
                leaderboardPopup.classList.add('show');
                leaderboardPopupList.innerHTML = '<div class="leaderboard-loading">Loading...</div>';
                
                try {
                    const response = await lib.getTopNEntriesFromLeaderboard(10);
                    if (response.entries && response.entries.length > 0) {
                        displayLeaderboardInPopup(response.entries, playerRank);
                    } else {
                        leaderboardPopupList.innerHTML = '<div class="leaderboard-error">No entries yet.</div>';
                    }
                } catch (error) {
                    leaderboardPopupList.innerHTML = '<div class="leaderboard-error">Failed to load leaderboard.</div>';
                }
            }
            
            function displayLeaderboardInPopup(entries, currentRank) {
                leaderboardPopupList.innerHTML = '';
                
                entries.forEach((entry, index) => {
                    const rank = index + 1;
                    const isCurrentPlayer = rank === currentRank;
                    
                    const entryDiv = document.createElement('div');
                    entryDiv.className = `leaderboard-entry rank-${rank}`;
                    
                    if (isCurrentPlayer) {
                        entryDiv.classList.add('current-player');
                    }
                    
                    const rankSpan = document.createElement('span');
                    rankSpan.className = 'leaderboard-rank';
                    rankSpan.textContent = rank <= 3 ? ['🥇', '🥈', '🥉'][rank - 1] : `#${rank}`;
                    
                    const playerDiv = document.createElement('div');
                    playerDiv.className = 'leaderboard-player';
                    
                    const avatar = document.createElement('img');
                    avatar.className = 'leaderboard-avatar';
                    avatar.src = entry.profilePicture || '';
                    avatar.onerror = function() { this.style.display = 'none'; };
                    
                    const username = document.createElement('span');
                    username.className = 'leaderboard-username';
                    username.textContent = entry.username || 'Anonymous';
                    if (isCurrentPlayer) username.textContent += ' (You)';
                    
                    playerDiv.appendChild(avatar);
                    playerDiv.appendChild(username);
                    
                    const scoreSpan = document.createElement('span');
                    scoreSpan.className = 'leaderboard-score';
                    scoreSpan.textContent = entry.score.toLocaleString();
                    
                    entryDiv.appendChild(rankSpan);
                    entryDiv.appendChild(playerDiv);
                    entryDiv.appendChild(scoreSpan);
                    
                    leaderboardPopupList.appendChild(entryDiv);
                });
            }

            function loadBestiaryFromConfig() {
                const saved = config.bestiaryKills || {};
                totalKillsByType.normal = saved.normal || 0;

                totalKillsByType.helmet = saved.helmet || 0;

                totalKillsByType.boneThrower = saved.boneThrower || 0;
                totalKillsByType.screamer = saved.screamer || 0;
            }
            
            function saveBestiaryToConfig() {
                if (!config.bestiaryKills) config.bestiaryKills = {};
                config.bestiaryKills.normal = totalKillsByType.normal;
                config.bestiaryKills.crawler = totalKillsByType.crawler;
                config.bestiaryKills.helmet = totalKillsByType.helmet;
                config.bestiaryKills.runner = totalKillsByType.runner;
                config.bestiaryKills.giant = totalKillsByType.giant;
                config.bestiaryKills.bat = totalKillsByType.bat;
                config.bestiaryKills.dog = totalKillsByType.dog;
                config.bestiaryKills.boneThrower = totalKillsByType.boneThrower;
                config.bestiaryKills.screamer = totalKillsByType.screamer;
            }
            
            // Track a zombie kill by type
            function trackZombieKill(zombie) {
                if (zombie.isGiant) {
                    waveKillsByType.giant++;
                    totalKillsByType.giant++;
                } else if (zombie.isScreamer) {
                    waveKillsByType.screamer++;
                    totalKillsByType.screamer++;
                } else if (zombie.isBoneThrower) {
                    waveKillsByType.boneThrower++;
                    totalKillsByType.boneThrower++;
                } else if (zombie.isRunner) {
                    waveKillsByType.runner++;
                    totalKillsByType.runner++;
                } else if (zombie.hasHelmet || zombie.hadHelmet) {
                    waveKillsByType.helmet++;
                    totalKillsByType.helmet++;
                } else if (zombie.isCrawler) {
                    waveKillsByType.crawler++;
                    totalKillsByType.crawler++;
                } else {
                    waveKillsByType.normal++;
                    totalKillsByType.normal++;
                }
                saveBestiaryToConfig();
            }
            
            // Track a bat kill
            function trackBatKill() {
                waveKillsByType.bat++;
                totalKillsByType.bat++;
                saveBestiaryToConfig();
            }
            
            // Track a dog kill
            function trackDogKill() {
                waveKillsByType.dog++;
                totalKillsByType.dog++;
                saveBestiaryToConfig();
            }
            
            // Generate kill breakdown HTML with CSS zombie model icons (no names, just icons + count)
            function generateKillBreakdownHTML() {
                const typeInfo = {
                    normal: { iconClass: 'zombie-icon zombie-icon-normal' },
                    crawler: { iconClass: 'zombie-icon zombie-icon-crawler' },
                    helmet: { iconClass: 'zombie-icon zombie-icon-helmet' },
                    runner: { iconClass: 'zombie-icon zombie-icon-runner' },
                    giant: { iconClass: 'zombie-icon zombie-icon-giant' },
                    bat: { iconClass: 'zombie-icon zombie-icon-bat' },
                    boneThrower: { iconClass: 'zombie-icon zombie-icon-boneThrower' },
                    screamer: { iconClass: 'zombie-icon zombie-icon-screamer' },
                    dog: { iconClass: 'zombie-icon zombie-icon-dog' }
                };
                
                let html = '';
                let hasKills = false;
                
                for (const [type, count] of Object.entries(waveKillsByType)) {
                    if (count > 0) {
                        hasKills = true;
                        const info = typeInfo[type];
                        html += `<div class="kill-type">
                            <span class="${info.iconClass}"></span>
                            <span class="type-count">×${count}</span>
                        </div>`;
                    }
                }
                
                return hasKills ? html : '';
            }
